records.中文校歌歌詞: 同學要努力，同學要努力，齊學會守規安靜專心上課。同學要努力，同學要努力，齊學會分析、結論、報告、發現，同學要積極，同學要積極，齊學會研究科技創新。靈活思考每事都愛去探索，主動解決困和難。愛秩序灣，愛秩序灣，同學是友愛共融互信。正面人生，喚發潛能，敢於挑戰創未來。愛秩序灣，愛秩序灣，同學是友愛共融互信。正面人生，喚發潛能，敢於挑戰創未來。

records.校名: 安菲爾聖鮑思高冠英學校
records.School Name: Anfield St. Bosco Koon Ying Schoo
records.id: 安菲爾聖鮑思高冠英學校

records.英文校歌歌詞:
Father in heav'n who lovest all.
O help thy children when they call;
That they may build from age to age
An undefiled heritage.
Teach us to bear the yoke in youth,
With steadfastness and careful truth;
That in our time thy grace may give
The truth whereby the nations live.
Teach us to look in all our ends
On thee for judge, and not our friends;
That we, with thee, may walk uncowed
By fear or favour of the crowd.
Teach us the strength that cannot seek,
By deed or thought, to hurt the weak;
That, under thee, we may possess
Man's strength to comfort man's distress.
Teach us delight in simple things.
And mirth that has no bitter springs;
Forgiveness free of evil done
And love to all men 'neath the sun.

I
Our Father, by whose servants
Our house was built of old,
Whose hand hath crowned her children
with blessings manifold,
For thine unfailing mercies
Far-strewn along our way,
With all who passed before us,
We praise thy name to-day.
II
The changeful years unresting
Their silent course have sped,
New comrades ever bringing
In comrades’ steps to tread;
And some are long forgotten,
Long spent their hopes and fears;
Safe rest they in thy keeping,
Who changest not with years.
III
They reap not where they laboured,
We reap what they have sown;
Our harvest may be garnered
By ages yet unknown.
The days of old have dowered us
With gifts beyond all praise:
Our Father, make us faithful
To serve the coming days.
IV
Before us and beside us,
Still holden in thine hand,
A cloud unseen of witness,
Our elder comrades stand:
One family unbroken,
We join, with one acclaim,
One heart, one voice uplifting,
To glorify thy name.

records.英文校訓: The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom.

records.校訓說明: 本校秉承「敬業樂群」的校訓，為學生提供一個適當的學習環境。建構知識，並啟發學生潛能，提升自學能力，為終身學習奠下穩固基礎。學校亦透過全方位學習活動培養學生的多元興趣及共通能力，為社會培育一群富創意、具使命感及關心社會的良好公民。

records.School Name: Po On Commercial Association Wan Ho Kan Primary School
records.中文校歌歌詞:
浩浩香海，巍巍太平，英才薈萃，其富莫京。
猗歟我校、博大光明，敬遜時敏育菁菁。
師德似春風，同學如家庭。
新知深沉舊學邃，六年淬勵功小成。
毋忘我校訓，毋墮寶安聲，山高海深勉前程。

莊嚴燦爛覺苑中 我校矯然立
同學奮志須及時 勇猛向前進
利己利人尚力行 慈悲博愛並
改造社會渡人群 我輩應努力
寶覺寶覺諸同學 求學宜勤惕
當知國家興與亡 人人都有責
宏宣佛法賴英才 涵養真美德
努力愛校愛中華 富強從此奠

records.School Name: Ka Ling School Of The Precious Blood
records.中文校歌歌詞:
我可愛的嘉靈，美麗又安靜。
諸位老師都健康，教訓指導最嚴明。
同學朝夕共處，相敬如弟兄。
研究學問砥礪操行，發揚友愛致力和平。
上敬耶穌寶血，下愛普世人群。
我們是家庭的好兒女，學校的好學生。
立志要造福未來的社會。
作國家未來的主人，
我愛嘉靈，頌我嘉靈，
光芒萬大兮照世明燈。

records.School Name: Pui Ling School Of The Precious Blood
records.校訓說明: 發揚基督的愛與犧牲精神，奮發立志，朝向目標，求學上進，盡展天父所賜的潛能，立足社會為人群、國家服務作棟樑。
records.中文校歌歌詞:
培靈學校傳聖道，寶血精神日益揚。
學風好，知識新，培我聖教潔我心靈。
奮鬥力學不稍懈，服務人群不後人。
謝我天主勿墮勿忘，謝我天主勿墮勿忘。

records.School Name: Si Yuan School of the Precious Blood

records.校名: 寶血會伍季明紀念學校
records.School Name: Kwai Ming Wu Memorial School Of The Precious Blood
records.中文校歌歌詞:
恩 主 寶 血 既 曾 灑 世 上，眾 共 嘗 大 愛。
我 校 創 立 更 蒙 主 恩 賜，真 美 善 同 在。
小 小 一 株 幼 苗 需 壯 大，必 須 靠 種 栽。
努 力 教 導 努 力 澆 灌，真 理 心 中 載。
求 知 要 機 敏，求 教 不 怕 問。
學 道 莫 畏 艱 辛，誠 實 習 禮 守 訓。

records.英文校訓: Wisdom, Moral Intergrity, Courage, Personal and Social Responsibility
records.中文校歌歌詞:
寶血恩師聖道揚，樹人敷教啟門牆。
香海濱，爐烽旁，一堂濟濟絃歌洋洋。
敬業樂群學有方，自強不息德彌光。
謝我天主錫我周行，謝我天主錫我周行。

records.辦學團體: 杯澳公立學校管理委員會
records.中文校訓: 誠樸、忠信、仁愛、正直、敦厚
records.英文校訓: Sincerity and Simple, Loyalty, Charity, Honesty, Modesty
records.中文校歌歌詞:
我愛我杯澳學校環境幽清
位於鳳凰山之南山海環抱
西矚伶仃四周沃野連綿
勵學勤耕何為我校所倡
我愛我杯澳學校誠樸為訓
潛修遊憩樂何如美哉吾校
校舍新型平增嶼南景色
樂育英オ乃吾校之主旨

records.中文校訓: 全人發展、才德並重、致知創新、仁厚擇善
records.英文校訓: Nuture the whole person to pursue excellence in all endeavours. Grow stronge in mind and body. Perservere in times of hardship. Seek truth and beauty.
records.中文校歌歌詞: 愉快聲響遍全校，齊步向上求精進，藝、美、德、樂、仁、愛、體、智、群，師長護愛勵勉。用創新方法傳達，培育責任和品格，沐我心靈，尊長孝親，家校緊扣傳樂韻。北官，是我家，讓我發揮創意，懷自信，凝聚愛的力量，共挽手，覓理想，開拓視野新境界；北官，伴我長，未懼怕風雨，全賴你，循循善誘不倦。這個家，樂善勇敢，憧憬邁向好將來！

records.School Name: North Point Government Primary School (Cloudview Road)
records.英文校訓: Be kind, happy, progressive and hard-working

records.中文校訓: 智者不惑，仁者不憂，勇者不懼
records.英文校訓: Resist temptation, the benevolent will have no worries, the brave will not succumb to fear
records.中文校歌歌詞:
1.﻿決決香海峭峭爐峰，衛理屹立其中，人才作育化雨春風，智仁勇啟童蒙，旗飄紅白招展高空，倡博愛尚大同，勤修品德不矜不怠，基督真理是宗。
2.決決香海峭峭爐峰，衛理屹立其中，絃歌不輟教澤無窮，揚木鐸振聵聲，蜚謦四海飲譽亞東，喜桃李鬱蔥蔥，淩霄壯志為神為國，基督真理是宗。

records.英文校訓: Complying with the word of God
records.中文校歌歌詞:
1. 巍峨瑰麗，黌舍聳立，是我循道雄姿。
其聲其譽，我樂頌揚，其名繫我維思。
2. 切磋琢磨，為學孜孜，藏修息遊於斯。
建業立德，奠我根基，前路揚鑣分馳。
3. 雖則分馳，我心靡離，摯愛互為連繫。
親切友誼，作我羈縻，直至永世無既。
副歌：	循道循道，其名芬菲。我眾樂歌不疲。
精誠愛護，協力保持。但願永世昌丕。

records.辦學團體: 香港基督教播道會聯會
records.英文校訓: Proclaim the Truth. Nurture our Youth.
records.中文校歌歌詞: 宣道同學起來！大家立定心志，努力學業，充實自己，聖經訓言常記。當趁現在求學時，就要建立好根基，將來為主宣揚真理，謀人類福祉。

records.School Name: Pok Oi Hospital Chan Kwok Wai Primary School
Choi Wan St. Joseph's Primary School
records.中文校歌歌詞:
仁愛的師長教導善循和暖像太陽,
同學每天互勉切磋，勤學復相親互愛!
伴那彩雲的心，覓那彩雲的盼望，
越過阻障覓真理，懷著信心步前往!
年少的當應努力自強誰畏路太長,
同學要品學兩兼優，朝著目標的路向!
共唱彩雲的歌，實踐彩雲的寄望,
熱愛光愛慕真理，盡我心為和平歌唱!

records.校名: 慈雲山聖文德天主教小學
records.School Name: Tsz Wan Shan St. Bonaventure Catholic Primary School
records.校訓說明: 我校乃天主教方濟會所興辦。校訓之拉丁原文為 "Ubi Humilitas, Ibi Sapientia"，及出自主保聖人聖 文德，意思是「那裡有謙誠，那裡有智慧」，表達出他秉承會祖聖方濟的精神，以謙虛誠摯的態度，在神前人 前，求學求道的心。中文校訓將原文濃縮為兩個要點：「謙誠智慧」乃用以訓勉我校同學都能以聖文德為師。
records.中文校歌歌詞:
巍巍我校屹立山腰，慈雲山中樹人施教。
大聖文德我校主保，生活南針，學程嚮導。
春風時雨，撫育青苗，進德修業志氣高。
願我同學勤勞共勉，光揚聖教為民英雄。
records.英文校歌歌詞: 1. With joyful hearts we all salute you. St Bonaventure Schools, Proud to were your colors brown and blue. Token of true love manifold. We'll be thinking of yhou always. Bonny kids we'll be all our days. Onward we'll march with hands united. That we pledge with loyal hearts. 2. With joyful hearts we all salute you. St Bonaventure Schools, Proud to were your colors brown and blue. Token of true love manifold. We'll be thinking of yhou always. Bonny kids we'll be all our days. Onward we'll march with hands united. That we pledge with love sincere.
records.id: 慈雲山聖文德天主教小學

records.英文校歌歌詞:
Come, raise, O raise a hearty cheer,
Let voices blend in accents clear
In praise of our dear school.
Good Hope, forever true,
Good Hope, all hail to you!
You lead our gladsome youth
In radiant ways of truth.
Solo (Seniors)
High on Kowloon's verdant slope
Shining like a beacon bright,
Stands our dear school of Good Hope
Realm of Mary, Queen of Light.
There we learn the why of life,
There we ready for the strife.
Knowledge is our goal,
Knowledge of the things of earth,
Knowledge of the soul.
Solo (Juniors)
In its classrooms it imparts
Noble lessons day by day
Forming eager minds and hearts
In a gentle, loving way.
Hope its watchword, love its rule,
Is there such another school?
Loyal we will be,
To Our Lady of Good Hope,
Loyal we will be!

records.英文校歌歌詞:
We do our task with joy in this our happy school,
With friends on every side, our duty is our rule.
May innocence forever illuminate our joy,
May friendship happy bond bind us for ever more.
We work and play in season gay,
We love our duty dear.
We have our part to play on earth,
Our part we play With cheer.
The Christ Child has taught us the way,
Like Him, we work and play.
With joy, to please Him, we obey,
Unseen He walks by our side.

records.校訓說明:
信
信就是所望之事的實底，未見之事的確據。
（希伯來書十一章一節）
望
倚靠耶和華，以耶和華為可靠的，那人有福了。
（耶利米書十七章七節）
愛
愛是恒久忍耐，又有恩慈，愛是不嫉妒，愛是不自誇，
不張狂，不作害羞的事，不求自己的益處，不輕易發怒，
不計算人的惡，不喜歡不義，只喜歡真理、凡事包容、
凡事相信、凡事盼望、凡事忍耐，愛是永不止息。
（哥林多前書十三章四至八節）
records.中文校歌歌詞:

人生目標真善美，十架救恩信望愛，
明德公正，敬業樂群，愛人如己，忠主榮神。
今日是一個好學生，將來是一個好公民。

records.英文校歌歌詞:
March, March, dear school friends,
Shoulder to shoulder,
Our heads lifted high.
Let us march to bear witness to Christ;
And vow ne’er to pause,
Till we bring all to love and serve His cause.
(Refrain) We learn to live in unity
In our Holy Family
“Faith, Love, Duty”- these we will bring,
As our gifts to God our King.
We pray and sing with one accord.
To thank and praise the living God.
Loyal and faithful loving true;
Holy Family, we are proud of you.
Work, work, dear classmates,
Play well together
At work and at play,
Holy Family shines all the way,
Our School gives guidance kind,
To build a perfect character and mind.
Love, love, dear sisters,
In my heart you’re near
To love and to care,
In the Christian spirit we all share.
Beloved school of mine,
On you may all the love of Jesus shine.

records.校訓說明: 「明道」即明白神的道，走當行的路之意。 「達才」即實現、發展全面才能之意。「明道達才」就是明白神的道，並成為有用之才。
records.中文校歌歌詞:
沙田圍呂明才是快樂家庭，
優質教育，有好的願景。
靠著神話語，尊敬父母師長，
具德靈智體群美「明道達才」。
虔誠有信德，愛心充滿世間，
潛能盡發揮，時刻溫暖歡暢。
讚頌神救恩至善真理，
為主作光，願作出貢獻。

records.校訓說明: 「博文」出於《論語雍也第六》,其意思是君子要博覽典籍,循守禮法。「弘道」出自《衛靈公第十五》:意思是人能使道發揚光大,不能慼藉道來弘大個人。我們學習知識不是用來炫耀自己,而是服侍神,傳揚福音,領人歸主。

records.校訓說明: 人性本善，孩子的心是純潔的，就像一面明淨的鏡子。學生從小就在學習跟天主的道理來處事待人。自能做到終其一生心如明鏡，日月可鑑，無愧天地。本校時刻以校訓「明心」勉勵學生，以上主智慧和大愛作為人生的歸向。
records.中文校歌歌詞:
天父的恩手拖帶我，來到景天園地，
景天校園是我成長地，使我明白真理。
恩師延伸天父的愛循循善誘教導我，
培育我這棵幼樹苗，使我六育才能展。
更應當要愛主愛人，效法耶穌基督，
我扶助弱小為我主發光，作社會棟樑。

For the glory of Chan Kwong.
In the days that have gone by, there were keepers of the light,

we too will keep the light, keep it shining for Chan Kwong.

records.英文校訓: To Act Benevolently and to Teach Benevolence
records.校訓說明: 「普濟」即盡一己之力以助困厄，以扶無依。物質之樂助，見諸慷慨解囊；精神之扶持，則以鼓勵關懷，導人於平安寧靜。「勸善」乃以言以行，導人向善。即既以言教，循循善誘；或以身教，樹立榜樣。祈能改造心靈，化戾氣為祥和。
records.中文校歌歌詞:
儒釋道三教同源，智仁勇，達德常溫，
春風化雨，教澤浩瀚永長存。
崇仁重禮，明倫弼教一同尊，至道玄玄眾妙門，
普濟勸善沐鴻恩，進碩德修駿業，毋忘教誨金玉言，
奠良基，步鵬程，勤毅勉旃可掄元。
records.id: 嗇色園主辦可譽中學暨可譽小學

records.英文校歌歌詞:
Boys of courage, boys of daring,
Full of manliness and will;
Spirits nought for danger caring,
Hearts to conquer every ill.
Chorus:
We are sons of La Salle everyone,
And no matter where we go,
High aloft her flag we will hold,
And strive that her fame may grow.
There are famous schools in plenty,
With their heroes by the score,
And they flourish high and mighty,
But La Salle is something more.
From her lofty station pointing,
To the sky’s majestic dome,
She would have us ever minding,
That above is our true home.
Come whatever kind of weather,
Come the stormy days along,
When the Old Boys get together,
They will always sing this song.

records.School Name: Hoi Ping Chamber Of Commerce Primary School
records.校訓說明:
德 - 是做人之本。我期望學生懂得尊重、感恩與承擔，在群體中建立正向關係，成為有品格、有情懷的人。
智 - 是探索之志。知識不應止於課本，我鼓勵學生勇於提問、敢於創新，在學習中培養批判思維與解難能力。
健 - 是成長之基。身心健康是學習的根本，我重視學生的情緒發展與身體鍛鍊，讓他們在穩定與自信中迎接挑戰。
勤 - 是成功之路。勤奮不只是努力，更是堅持與自律。我希望學生明白，真正的成就來自日積月累的付出與堅持。
records.中文校歌歌詞: 開平黌宮，澤被童蒙，莘莘學子，切磋其中：歌斯頌斯，樂也融融，移風易俗，發瞶震聾；興學育才，僑胞推崇；好同學，志氣雄，齊發憤，勤用功，大家做個好兒童。

O Maryknoll, O Maryknoll,
Thy name most honoured be!
‘Tis given for the Queen of heav’n
Who shall our model be;
Through whom our school shall lead us,
To follow Christ, her Son,
Who is the centre of our lives,
The guardian of our school days.
We give our lives, our love, our trust to thee,
O Queen of Maryknoll.
We will forever be true.
Sing praise to her, sing praise to her,
The school whose life we share.
Whose light shall be for us a flame,
To lead us on to right;
The mother of our future,
From whom we shall carry truth.
To home, to country, to the world;
We call this our first duty.
We shall not fail in this our trust,
For we have pledged ourselves to thee.
O School we love Maryknoll.

records.中文校訓: 敬畏耶和華是智慧的開端，認識至聖者便是聰明。（箴言 : 九章10節）
records.中文校歌歌詞:
1.巍峨瑰麗黌舍聳立循道衛理雄姿
其聲其譽我樂頌揚其名繫我維思；
2.切磋琢磨為學孜孜藏修息遊於斯
建業立德奠我根基前路揚鑣分馳；
3.雖則分馳我心靡離摯愛互為連繫
親切友誼作我羈縻直至永世無既。
副：循道衛理其名芬菲我眾樂歌不疲
精誠愛護協力保持但願永世昌丕。

records.辦學團體: 香港九龍塘基督教中華宣道會
records.中文校訓: 敬畏耶和華是智慧的開端，認識至聖者便是聰明。
records.中文校歌歌詞:
宣道同學起來！大家立定心志，
努力學業，充實自己，聖經訓言常記。
當趁現在求學時，就要建立好根基，
將來為主宣揚真理，謀人類福祉。
榮神崇真守禮信義，純全仁愛敦厚善良。聽元首基督，學勤儉謙恭，將所學擅長為國用。愛傳播福音，為民族爭光，家國棟樑抵風雨。繁華叢生，繽紛吐艷，纍纍桃李弘神愛。

records.School Name: Shau Kei Wan Government Primary School
records.中文校歌歌詞: 曾經踏遍每一個角與落，愉快笑聲滿校園內，覓理想根基齊共建，專注學習更守規。齊心共勉相愛更互助，歷遍困苦不退縮，莫負師長教導和熱愛，雙親關懷勵勉心中載，努力向前，挫折艱難不會慌，大家，齊互勉，錦繡前程由我親手去創。

效法基督每一天並以歡欣作開始天主父創造
天主子救贖聖神來彰顯
步向深天每一課願以福音作宣講身心靈美善
師長的教導有仁慈的愛
願更新我生命願傾出愛不停
讓我顯出愛主心能貢獻為人類
願更新我心靈願捉緊我使命
面對艱苦也不屈仍不屈不撓
深天倚靠主的愛

records.校訓說明: 聖保錄宗徒致格林多人前書第九章第二十二節，COR. IX:22
records.英文校歌歌詞:
Hark! Daughters of the great St. Paul
Come, listen to his call
"O children of this loved school,
The loving nurse of all
Rejoice in God, do work and pray
Be true from day to day."
Beloved school of mine
My pains and joys are thine.
My childhood's early dreams
Are closely linked with thee. The hope that heaven brings
Thou dost unfold to me.
Thou dost unfold to me.
Sweet are the days of girlhood,
When friends we love and care,
Those golden links of childhood,
Whose sympathy we share.
Do stay and while the hours away
With us in work and play.
And when we leave
Our dear old school
These mem'ries we'll recall!
These mem'ries we'll recall!

Thou dost unfold to me.
Thou dost unfold to me.
Sweet are the days of girlhood,
When friends we love and care,
Those golden links of childhood,
Whose sympathy we share.
Do stay and while the hours away
With us in work and play.
And when we leave
Our dear old school
These mem'ries we'll recall!
These mem'ries we'll recall!

records.校名: 聖保羅男女中學附屬小學
records.School Name: St. Paul's Co-educational College Primary School
records.校訓說明:
信 望 愛
我若能說萬人的方言、並天使的話語、卻沒有愛、我就成了鳴的鑼、響的鈸一般。我若有先知講道之能、也明白各樣的奧秘、各樣的知識。而且有全備的信、叫我能夠移山、卻沒有愛、我就算不得甚麼。我若將所有的賙濟窮人、又捨己身叫人焚燒、卻沒有愛、仍然與我無益。
愛是恆久忍耐、又有恩慈。愛是不嫉妒。愛是不自誇。不張狂。不作害羞的事。不求自己的益處。不輕易發怒。不計算人的惡。不喜歡不義。只喜歡真理。凡事包容。凡事相信。凡事盼望。凡事忍耐。
愛是永不止息。先知講道之能、終必歸於無有。說方言之能、終必停止、知識也終必歸於無有。我們現在所知道的有限、先知所講的也有限。等那完全的來到、這有限的必歸於無有了。我作孩子的時候、話語像孩子、心思像孩子、意念像孩子。既成了人、就把孩子的事丟棄了。我們如今彷彿對著鏡子觀看、模糊不清。到那時、就要面對面了。我如今所知道的有限。到那時就全知道、如同主知道我一樣。如今常存的有信、有望、有愛、這三樣、其中最大的是愛。
歌林多前書 第十三章
records.英文校歌歌詞:
We build our School on Thee, O Lord,
To Thee we bring our common need,
The loving heart, the helpful word,
The tender thought, the kindly deed.
We work together in Thy sight,
We live together in Thy love;
Guide Thou our faltering steps aright,
And lift our thoughts to Heaven above.
Hold Thou each hand to keep it just,
Touch Thou our lips and make them pure;
If Thou art with us, Lord, we must
Be faithful friends and comrades sure.
We change, but Thou art still the same,
The same good Master, Teacher, Friend;
We change, but Lord, we bear Thy Name,
To journey with it to the end.
Dear Lord we pray,
Thy Spirit may Be present in our school alway.
records.id: 聖保羅男女中學附屬小學

records.英文校訓: The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom
records.英文校歌歌詞:
Once again we here foregather,
pledge obedience to this rule:
That we ever will be faithful
to the teachings of our School.
Justice, Honour, Truth and Virtue
shall the watchwords be for all.
We thy sons who learnt these precepts
in the College of St. Paul,
Brothers here we stand together
all for each and each for all.
Down the years we will be faithful
to the College of St. Paul.

records.School Name: Aberdeen St. Peter's Catholic Primary School
records.中文校歌歌詞:
維我伯多綠，
鍾毓群英，
淬礪由來早有名。
寸陰須愛惜，
專樹好模型，
幼學壯而行，
努力趁年輕。
願諸君，向鵬程，
奮翮光榮聖教造福蒼生。

records.School Name: St. Patrick's Catholic Primary School (Po Kong Village Road)
records.中文校歌歌詞:
朝氣蓬勃志高昂，同窗共一堂。
德、智、體、群互砥礪，琴書聲朗朗。
上主聖訓修習為常；敬主愛人，實踐發揚。
景仰先賢聖博德，服務人群作棟樑。

朝氣蓬勃志高昂，同窗共一堂。

records.School Name: St. Francis Of Assisi's Caritas School
records.中文校訓: 愛主愛人 服務社群
records.中文校歌歌詞:
天主，使我作你和平的工具。
在有仇恨的地方，讓我播種仁愛；
在有殘害的地方，讓我播種寬恕；
在有猜疑的地方，讓我播種信任；
在有絕望的地方，讓我播種希望；
在有黑暗的地方，讓我播種光明；
在有憂苦的地方，讓我播種喜樂。
天主，使我作你和平的工具。
我不企求他人的安慰，只求安慰他人，
我不企求他人的諒解，只求諒解他人，
我不企求他人的愛護，只求愛護他人。
天主，使我作你和平的工具。
因為在施捨他人時，我們接受施予；
因為在寬恕他人時，我們獲得寬恕；
因為在喪失生命時，我們生於永恆。
天主，使我作你和平的工具。

records.School Name: St. Francis Of Assisi's English Primary School
records.校訓說明:
The motto in Latin, quoted from St. John’s Gospel, Chapter 20, Verse 28, is translated into English as “MY LORD AND MY GOD”.  This was the profession of faith by St. Thomas the Apostle, the way he acknowledged Jesus upon seeing Him after He had risen from the dead.  Through St. Thomas, Jesus has taught us that “Blessed are those who have not seen and yet believe” (John 20:29).  In other words, “Blessed are those who have not seen Jesus Himself with their own eyes and yet believe Him to be the Lord of the Universe and the true God.”
St. Francis of Assisi, the Patron Saint of our School, like countless Christians down through the centuries, was “blessed” because he firmly believed in Jesus as “Lord” and “God”.  With a profound sense of humility and compassion, he followed the teaching and example of Jesus, to the point of giving up all earthly possessions and honours in looking for God as the sole God, the source of Happiness and the Goal of man’s life on earth.  That was why his own motto was: “DEUS MEUS ET OMNIA”, which in English means “MY GOD AND MY ALL”.
In adopting the above motto, our School affirms its determination to offer to prepare its students properly for their life and future responsibilities, in face of the challenges of a fast-changing world, by upholding and passing on to them the core values of Catholic Education and the Christian faith, which professes Jesus and “Lord” and “God”, and as the One who shows us our goal in life and brings us to true “Happiness”.
records.中文校歌歌詞: 效法主保方濟為世添和平，礪學修身春風栽種百樹人，仁義禮，信望愛，德智體群美，共建立善美品格。實踐聖經真理，宏揚慈父恩寵，敬主關愛別人。盡發揮我恩賜，互切磋共進步，棟樑全在聖方濟各。建棟樑全在聖方濟各。
records.英文校歌歌詞:
Oh ! my good Lord! Oh! my good Lord!
Let me be the way for peace .
Bring all people faith but not doubt .
Let me love them but not hate .
Bring all people hope, not despair.
Bring them true light, not darkness.
Give all people joy, not sadness.
For this I pray, Oh! my Lord!

1.美哉我聖公會學校，林立港九，遠近蜚聲，
本主基督博愛精神，樂聚群英。
2.格我以誠，導我以正，仁義為準，道德為繩，

1.美哉我聖公會學校，林立港九，遠近蜚聲，
本主基督博愛精神，樂聚群英。
2.格我以誠，導我以正，仁義為準，道德為繩，
良師益友，切磋砥礪，培育心靈。
副：節儉習慣養成，刻苦精神充盈，德智體群美，應與日俱進。乃役於人，仰我校訓，學子自當拳拳服膺努力前程，修身立行，榮耀我主名。

本主基督博愛精神，樂聚群英。
2.格我以誠，導我以正，仁義為準，道德為繩，
良師益友，切磋砥礪，培育心靈。
副：節儉習慣養成，刻苦精神充盈，德智體群美，應與日俱進。乃役於人，仰我校訓，學子自當拳拳服膺努力前程，修身立行，榮耀我主名。

records.中文校訓: 愛主愛人、仁愛、服從、勤勞
records.中文校歌歌詞:
可愛耶穌，仁慈童貞瑪利亞，至榮若瑟三聖為一家，求爾三聖賜福我的家庭，立功德效法聖家，立功德效法聖家。
聖家三聖，汝為家庭表率，一生熱誠，虔敬事主殷勤：我等求汝，賜我尊親睦鄰生活聖潔，決心愛主愛人。可愛耶穌，仁慈童貞瑪利亞，至榮若瑟三聖為一家，求爾三聖賜福我的家庭，立功德效法聖家，立功德效法聖家。

records.校訓說明:
“VERITAS VINCIT”
or
“TRUTH CONQUERS”
“Veritas vincit” is a Latin phrase. In English, it means “Truth conquers all”.
“Christ is the foundation of the school
as He is the way, the truth and the life.”
records.英文校歌歌詞:
St. Clare's School! To you we sing this glad refrain
St. Clare's School! Our hearts with love brim over
Hear! Hear! Hear! Our voices rise in praise
For you we'll make echoes ring
To the mem'ry of these school days
Faithful forever
Then let us enjoy these bright years
Which ne'er will come again
St. Clare's School! To you we sing this glad refrain
St. Clare's School! Our hearts with love brim over
Hear! Hear! Hear! Our voices rise in praise
St. Clare's School! Alma Mater
In your hall we’ve found a noble truth
An ideal that will be strong and lasting
For your youth receive their thanks and their pledge
Giv'n to thee in this our loyal song
For higher things daily let's pray and strive
Through life's frays we'll ever stand and fight
Alma Mater we'll ever keep alive
God's ways you so deeply taught us love
St. Clare's School! To you we sing this glad refrain
St. Clare's School! Our hearts with love brim over
Hear! Hear! Hear! Our voices rise in praise
St. Clare's School! Alma Mater
Hear and rev'rent join our pray'r
Father in heaven, guide us we pray Thee
And from temptation keep us this day
Bring all to serve Thee
Bring all to love Thee
Help us we pray Thee to drive sin away
Bring all to serve Thee
Bring all to love Thee
Help us we pray Thee to drive sin away
St. Clare's School! To you we sing this glad refrain
St. Clare's School! Our hearts with love brim over
Hear! Hear! Hear! Our voices rise in praise
For you we'll make echoes ring
To the mem'ry of these school days
Faithful forever
Then let us enjoy these bright years
Which ne'er will come again
Hear! Hear! Hear! Happy voices are singing
Hear! Hear! Hear! Merry voices are singing
St. Clare's School! We'll always keep Thine honour fair
Let us sing these words of praise
We acclaim thy name
We acclaim thy name
Lift our voices again
Praise to thee
Dear School!

records.中文校歌歌詞: 聖德嘉祿我校，主保指示我指示我作人軌，道勤專以恆堅持善信，勉勵我敬業樂群，江山如晝，日月如輪，莫等閒空負光陰，莫等閒空負光陰

records.School Name: Salesian of Don Bosco Saint Louis School (Primary Section)
records.英文校歌歌詞:
All Hail! All Hail!
Salesian School to thee!
By time endeared the more,
our hearts shall ever ever loyal be
to thee and friends of yore,
and memories that shall never never fade
wherever we may roam,
shall rivet fast the friendships made
in youth at boyhood’s home.
Long live our Alma Mater!
On thee may blessings rain,
and may thy sons hereafter
bring honour to thy name.
Saint Louis School,
guide of our youth,
we are loyal to you in faith and truth.
Saint Louis School,
guide of our youth,
we are loyal to you in faith and truth.
All Hail!

records.辦學團體: 瑪利亞方濟各傳教修會
records.英文校歌歌詞:
There's the happy laughter of merry maids
In a school that I dearly love
Where the school girl plays and her sorrow fades
Midst the love that is born from heav'n above
Where she learns to study and how to play
Not a single moment lost per day
And if duties are bravely and fairly done
She finds joy and happiness, friends and fun
# Sing to St. Rose of Lima's
Home of our childhood years
Where we are true and fun loving too
Where happiness dries our tears
Now dear St. Rose of Lima's
Each of us bravely strives
That from today
Ever we may
Honour thee in our lives. #
Yes we learn to study, to work, to play
To be skilled in the higher arts
But this knowledge time will soon sweep away
It does not prove the worth of the truest hearts
Here are lessons taught of a noble kind
That Our Lady plants in every mind
They are loyalty, honour and kindliness
To guide us through life to the land of bliss

records.中文校歌歌詞:
嘉木環翠氣清新，綠蔭窗檽境幽靜。
勝蹟名山近，朝暉晚霞明。
鳥語花香弦歌誦，四時讀書樂其中。
擷研科技藝文，承繼先賢聖訓，勤儉孝悌勇毅，敦品立行。
聖母無玷聖心佑我明，絜我行。尊敬師長，孝順雙親。少力學，壯志成，弘揚校譽，丕振家聲。

records.School Name: St. John The Baptist Catholic Primary School
records.中文校歌歌詞:
汪洋海洋，半島之東；紀念若翰，立我廣宮；
巍巍聖德，藹藹春風；學之習之，夙夜景從；
苦身克己，誠樸謙恭；辟邪破偽，化惑啟蒙；
莘莘學子，勃勃蓬蓬；真理剛毅，造極登峰。

records.英文校歌歌詞:
All through St. Joseph’s a voice is resounding;
Promptly respond to your duty’s clear call;
Harken you all for the trumpet is sounding;
Your Mater’s proclaiming her watchword to all.
*(Chorus)
Forward, her children dear,
Ever with hearts sincere,
Render with joy to your Mater her due;
All that is vile reject;
Heaven will e’er protect,
Sons of St. Joseph’s valiant and true.
“Labour and Virtue” your motto still bearing,
Forward with courage in ways that are just;
True to your standard be doing and daring,
As faithful Josephians in Heaven you trust.
*(Chorus)
Onward and upward in life’s earnest battle,
Joyously bearing the brunt of the fight,
Nobly forgiving for aught that may pain you,
And bravely defending the cause of the right.
*(Chorus)
Lift up your hearts for a kingdom awaits you,
Honour and Virtue with courage defend;
Serve Him in life, who in death can reward you,
And vow to be faithful and true to the end.
*(Chorus)

records.校訓說明: a Latin phrase meaning to the stars, it signifies our desire to excel in all fields of school life.
records.英文校歌歌詞:
Come you loyal son Josephian,
sing your Alma Mater’s praise!
Let our youthful voices proudly sing
with the love of her kindly way.
* When the road of life is rough up hill
and the skies hang grey and grim;
then our steps will be light,
and our eyes shining bright,
like true sons of SJACS.
Though the days of boyhood speed away,
never to return again;
though this day will be the morrow’s past,
yet are we tomorrow’s men.
Repeat *
Dear St. Joseph be our lasting guide,
be our strength through the years ahead.
On heart and mind, on home and friend,
your gracious influence shed.
Repeat *
Come you loyal old Josephian,
sound your Alma Mater’s praise!
With grateful voices now let’s sing
the cherished joys of former days.
Repeat *

records.校名: 聖士提反女子中學附屬小學
records.中文校歌歌詞:
救主乃是學校根基：公共需要，向主禱祈，
仁愛胸懷，溫柔意緒，善良事業，清潔行為。
大家同工，在主目中，大家生活，在主愛中；
求主引導我眾前行，使我思想與天相通。
求使眾手行事公平，求使眾舌語言潔淨；
倘若與主相親相近，待遇友朋，必能忠信。
我眾無常，惟主不變，永遠為我益友良師；
我雖無常，主名常住，願奉主名，永遠歸依。
阿們。
records.英文校歌歌詞:
We build our School on Thee, O Lord,
To Thee we bring our common need,
The loving heart, the helpful word,
The tender thought, the kindly deed.
We work together in Thy sight,
We live together in Thy love;
Guide Thou our faltering steps aright,
And lift our thoughts to Heaven above.
Hold Thou each hand to keep it just,
Touch Thou our lips and make them pure;
If Thou art with us, Lord, we must
Be faithful friends and comrades sure.
We change, but Thou art still the same,
The same good Master, Teacher, Friend;
We change, but Lord, we bear Thy Name,
To journey with it to the end.
Dear Lord we pray,
Thy Spirit may Be present in our school alway.
records.id: 聖士提反女子中學附屬小學

records.校名: 聖士提反書院附屬小學
records.英文校訓: Faith is the Foundation of Courage
records.英文校歌歌詞:
Our hearts are young our ideals high
We are prepared to work and play
To live good lives and to be true
In everything we do or say
So for St Stephen's let us strive
To fight, to win with steadfast pride
Life's a game that's made to play
With effort, teamwork, joy and tears
Based on tradition laid before
And wisdom growing with the years
So for St Stephen's let us strive
To fight, to win with steadfast pride
records.id: 聖士提反書院附屬小學

records.校訓說明: 及出自主保聖人聖文德，意思是「那裡有謙誠，那裡有智慧」，表達出他承會祖聖方濟的精神，以謙虛誠摯的態度，在神前人前，求學求道的心。中文校訓將原文濃縮為兩個要點：「謙誠智慧」乃用以訓勉我校同學都能以聖文德為師。
records.英文校歌歌詞:
"1:With joyful hearts we all salute you St. Bona venture Schools
Proud to wear your colours brown and blue
Token of true love manifold.
We'll be thinking of you always Bonny Kids we'll be all our days
Onward we'll march with hands united.
That we pledge with loyal hearts.

2:We will live in truth and justice Striving to follow virtue's way
For we'll have your strength and gui'dance.
In the precepts giv'n today.
We'll be thinking of you always Bonny Kids we'll be all our days
Onward we'll march with hands united.
That we pledge with loyal hearts.
That we pledge with love sincere."

records.中文校歌歌詞:
龍崗精神在我校發揚，世界光照萬邦興德昌；
孕育德行棟樑人共仰，堅守真道勇敢忠誠；
提攜少年奮力向新知，教誨不厭學子志堅貞；
服務天下勤勞為大眾，敦睦親誼推己及人；
謹守禮義忠恕自勵行，不為利引誘貧富亦不困；
尋求聖賢定能立志高，修身向義並肩膽壯剛強；

records.中文校歌歌詞:
三台聳峙 毓秀蔥蔥
含暉四照 遠近流光
大興建基 校舍堂皇
五育並進 桃李芬芳
琢磨國器 禮紀義綱
勉勵 勉勵兮 當自強
太古太古培植人材，為主旨實施教育，惠給群兒。豁免束脩，設備優良難比擬。使人獲得求學良機，尤可愛，我之師，灌輸吾儕德智兼體美，教之育之，善誘循循無倦意，使人欣欣向慕永依依。

records.中文校歌歌詞:

澄明香海，曠衍九龍；
皇皇我校，矗立其中。
繼柏增之遺志，颺柏增之高風；
樹人樹木，化惑啟蒙。
諮爾士子，夙夜景從；
愛人愛主，必敬必忠。
沐聖教之恩寵，為民眾之前鋒；
克承克紹，柏德永隆。
聖神寵賜，人間播澤延綿。博智啟聖庥祥錫我無邊。克明峻德，修身律己成全。黽勉琢麿，學問深究精研。育英才，教為先，信主樂群，聖道興焉。齊努力，繼前賢，不枉所學，勉荷仔肩，步武基督精神，勇往直前。

（1）人生旅程現已開展，步伐始於領島，
我們嚮往的美和愛，大家一起爭取，
遊戲與工作中追求，豈知所願難償，
學校助我認識天主是眾人的父親，
相親相愛才可得到他恩賜美和愛，
（2）渴望真理和平公義，和完美的世界，
期待人人溫和良善，無私充滿愛心，
求主賜我力量自新，夢境便可成真，
學校助我認識天主是眾人的父親，
相親相愛才可得到他恩賜美和愛。

我校矗立東方之珠，愛我明徳恪遵詩書，
眾山環抱滄海前橫，地擅形勝玉韻金聲，
校訓法主愛人如己，一堂濟濟誦主聖言，
師道矜式步武前賢，努力學業同報主恩。

宣揚天主福音，盡心盡力愛主愛人，
堅持忍耐仁愛，校訓校風記在心，非以役人乃役於人，善導精神，服務社群，珍惜生命，積極人生，五育並進，四維顯彰。
發揚基督精神，效法聖母瑪利亞，愛父母愛學校，愛香港愛國家，和平友愛謙遜有禮，勵志發奮，努力向上，力臻完美，自強不息，聖神恩寵，常傳我心。

records.School Name: Island Waldorf School of Hong Kong
records.校訓說明: 華德福是源自德國二十世紀初的人性化教育，學業、藝術、社交、自理並重，培養兒童身心靈的全面發展。

禮：規規矩矩的態度
義：正正當當的行為
廉：清清白白的操守
恥：切切實實的覺悟

records.School Name: Chiu Yang Primary School of Hong Kong
records.校訓說明: 本校以「篤行力學」為校訓，重視學問及品德修養，並鼓勵學生在日常生活中踐履所學，貫徹知行合一的精神。本校的教育目標是透過學業、訓育、輔導及活動四方面的培育，令學生在德、智、體、群、美五育中得到均衡及全面的發展。
records.中文校歌歌詞: 誠意唱出心中所想，懷著目標一起去創，成功必須努力，校訓遵守尊敬師長。“篤行力學”心中謹記，一同為理想不放棄，豐富知識的寶藏，天天去分享，為社會作棟樑，母校是潮陽。

男兒志兮四方、發榮滋長兮工與商。
工與商兮、榮華。光遠有耀兮自他。
海角兮天涯，總會四邑為一家。
既庶且富兮教之，
兒童就學兮及時，皆讀書而明理兮，
張我國之四維。興學兮育才，

records.School Name: True Light Middle School of Hong Kong (Primary Section)
records.英文校訓: You are the Light of the World
records.中文校歌歌詞:
第一段：
中華我國，中華我國，獨立文明亞之東。
政成共和，民歌大同，學遍唐虞三代隆。
中華我國，中華我國，十萬兆民表雄風。
衛我邦家，同胞情重，普遍教育樂融融。
第二段：
愛我真光，愛我真光，謝師長善誘維良。
發聾振瞶，啟迪多方，恍登臨洙泗之堂。
愛我真光，愛我真光，天道由茲愈發皇。
十字旗飄，萬古輝揚，能拯教失路亡羊。
第三段
勉哉同學，勉哉同學，暮暮朝朝同切磋。
光陰易逝，日月如梭，催人歲月易蹉跎。
勉哉同學，勉哉同學，廿紀風潮急且多。
木蘭紅玉，巾幗英雄，匡時偉業在我曹。

(一) 香島之九龍兮，遐邇皆聞。有女校兮，聲譽芳芬。
其志宏且高兮，其名協恩。振紀綱兮，志道依仁。
據德復游藝兮，求學心殷。為世光兮，為席上珍。
智圓而行方兮，純潔精神。挽世風兮，懇懇勤勤。
副歌：協恩，協恩，協恩。
萬載流芳兮，我協恩。
萬載流芳兮，我協恩。
協恩，協恩。
(二) 春風喜同詠兮，切磋頻頻。練體魄兮，健我心身。
中西樂研究兮，學識日新。宗基督兮，智理皆真。
作文化津梁兮，國粹長存。倡四育兮，德智體群。
萬壽永無疆兮，我校協恩。光我邦兮，輔我國民。

為神為人為國，求善求美求真，
協力和衷相愛相親，發揚我協和偉大之精神，
願我協和同學，宜砥礪切磋；
好時光莫輕易放過；奮前程，完責任，
奏凱歌同聲讚頌，
同聲讚頌我母校協和。

records.中文校歌歌詞:
1.巍峨瑰麗黌舍聳立循道衛理雄姿
其聲其譽我樂頌揚其名繫我維思；
2.切磋琢磨為學孜孜藏修息遊於斯
建業立德奠我根基前路揚鑣分馳；
3.雖則分馳我心靡離摯愛互為連繫
親切友誼作我羈縻直至永世無既。
副：循道衛理其名芬菲我眾樂歌不疲
精誠愛護協力保持但願永世昌丕。

records.辦學團體: 循理會美林小學有限公司
records.中文校訓: 如今常存的有信、有望、有愛，這三樣，其中最大的是愛。
records.校訓說明: 哥林多前書 13:13
records.中文校歌歌詞:
群山翠綠，
藍天映照
環抱快樂校園。
孩童尋獲善美
每天更亮更光。
晨光照耀
無比溫暖，
神愛滿溢校園。
容這片地
充滿處天之美。
循理美林
將愛傳遞，
良師每天共行。
循理美林
將真理傳授，
以真以誠
相親。
同心拍和，
同聲歡唱，
憑信建立未來，
齊讚美主大愛，
齊讚美主大愛。
鴨脷洲頭街坊學堂，輝煌校舍，雄據高岡，人文蔚起，環境優良，誠信勤敏，待我發揚，大家努力，莫負時光，敦品勵學，日進無疆。

1.﻿﻿紅爐峰下荃灣之東，學校設立啟童蒙。循循善誘，化雨春風，將來成器切磋工。
2.﻿﻿學主真道基督是崇，致知格物樂無窮。敬業樂羣，操練體躬，培養真美五育豐。
明道衞理，旗飄藍紅，亞斯理衞理小學，校譽日増聲日隆。
育才成廣廈，桑梓樂僑居，嘉會曾傳禮，春臺喜讀書。文宗白沙緒，學振飲冰餘，毋使弦歌輟，黃雲任卷書。

2.博愛行仁，百年樹人貢獻好，承先啟後，造就社會英豪，博愛精神，濟弱扶危倡領早，院開週甲，信仰先賢創造，盛哉母校，光明遠大前途。

records.School Name: Central And Western District St. Anthony's School
records.校訓說明: 中文校訓「篤信博愛」，意謂對天主要有堅定不移的信德，對人要有泛愛眾人的愛德。
records.中文校歌歌詞: 真理啟發，人格陶融，絃歌和樂，詩禮雍容。
如沾化兩，如坐春風，桃李競秀，頌主恩鴻。

巍峨我校環境清幽  良師益友共濟同舟
福音是訓真理是求  體智並重德學兼優
學問無限歲月難留  切磋研讀孜孜不休
願我同學努力進修  造福社會功著千秋

records.英文校訓: Build high ideals, cultivate noble sentiments.
records.校訓說明: 「志於道、游於藝」的意思是希望我們立定志向，學習立身處世的道理。盡其本份，推己及人。在學習過程中體會學習的樂趣，主動積極，並在浩瀚的知識領域裏悠然自得。
records.中文校歌歌詞:
我們相聚一起，在佐敦道官立小學
不斷嘗試，自強不息，每一天都是歡喜
我們相聚一起，在校園裡用心學習
充滿喜悅，充滿創意，陪伴著你往前行
同學們要努力，不要輕易就放棄
盡你全心，盡你全意，開創新的天地
我們同心合力，不怕狂風和暴雨
憑著信心期待明天夢想會實現

records.校名: 佐敦谷聖若瑟天主教小學
records.School Name: Jordan Valley St. Joseph's Catholic Primary School
records.中文校歌歌詞:
勤奮的同學
在老師悉心指引結伴行
沐遍暖暖春風
愛像細雨灑遍
佐敦谷聖若瑟
明理方明白
在基督恩典關愛結伴行
學了教誨知道
格物、友愛、篤信
心堅持 心開朗
自信探真理要互勉
凝聚創意動力
全為社會要向上
誠實勇毅愛主愛人
常放歌為樂
在基督旭光恩照結伴行
就向世界保證
永踏正確方向
此精神 不改變
records.id: 佐敦谷聖若瑟天主教小學

records.id: 中華基督教青年會基雋小學

records.英文校歌歌詞:
Father in heav'n who lovest all.
O help thy children when they call;
That they may build from age to age
An undefiled heritage.
Teach us to bear the yoke in youth,
With steadfastness and careful truth;
That in our time thy grace may give
The truth whereby the nations live.
Teach us to look in all our ends
On thee for judge, and not our friends;
That we, with thee, may walk uncowed
By fear or favour of the crowd.
Teach us the strength that cannot seek,
By deed or thought, to hurt the weak;
That, under thee, we may possess
Man's strength to comfort man's distress.
Teach us delight in simple things.
And mirth that has no bitter springs;
Forgiveness free of evil done
And love to all men 'neath the sun.

I
Our Father, by whose servants
Our house was built of old,
Whose hand hath crowned her children
with blessings manifold,
For thine unfailing mercies
Far-strewn along our way,
With all who passed before us,
We praise thy name to-day.
II
The changeful years unresting
Their silent course have sped,
New comrades ever bringing
In comrades’ steps to tread;
And some are long forgotten,
Long spent their hopes and fears;
Safe rest they in thy keeping,
Who changest not with years.
III
They reap not where they laboured,
We reap what they have sown;
Our harvest may be garnered
By ages yet unknown.
The days of old have dowered us
With gifts beyond all praise:
Our Father, make us faithful
To serve the coming days.
IV
Before us and beside us,
Still holden in thine hand,
A cloud unseen of witness,
Our elder comrades stand:
One family unbroken,
We join, with one acclaim,
One heart, one voice uplifting,
To glorify thy name.

records.校名: 保良局百周年李兆忠紀念中學
records.School Name: PLK Centenary Li Shiu Chung Memorial College
records.英文校歌歌詞:
Boys and girls of Po Leung College
To be honest and amiable
Brilliant and faithful, diligent and humble
These are the virtues we long for
Youths of courage, youths of daring
Full of perseverance and will
Spirits are always in progress
Hearts to conquer every ill
Well-known schools are plentiful
With thousands of heroes coming forth
And they flourish high and faithful
Po Leung College something more.

records.英文校歌歌詞:
Love and Service
Come friends and see the wonders of God
He gave us Jesus we are not alone on this earth
In fear and in doubt
His love is with us
Through rain or sunshine
His wand leads us
Lord bless our School
We are young and have dreams
And here in our dear School each day we learn
each we share in love and service
Let's join hands and bring hope to the world
Go, love and serve and thank the Lord
Go, love and serve and thank the Lord

records.中文校歌歌詞:
莊嚴燦爛覺苑中，我校矯然立。
同學奮志須及時，勇猛向前進。
利己利人尚立行，慈悲博愛並。
改造社會渡人群，我輩應努力。
寳覺寳覺諸同學，求學宜勤惕。
當知國家興與亡，人人都有責。
宏宣佛法賴英才，涵養真美德。
努力愛校愛中華，富強從此奠。

records.英文校歌歌詞:
1. Happy we in love united, Of the Holy Trinity, And of Mary, ever Virgin Daughter, Mother, Spouse, is She. Throough her gracious intercession May the God head, One in Three, Make us diligent and loyal, Strong in Faith and Purity.
2. When temptations dark surround us, we will always mindful be of the Precious Blood of Jesus shed for us up on the Tree; Blood that oped the gates of Heaven where we hope one day to See all our teachers and companions Worshipping the Trinity.
[Refrain] Striving onwards, Striving upwards. Let us never Cease to be, Daughters worthy of our alma Mater, Holy Trinity.

records.中文校歌歌詞:
寳血恩施聖道揚
樹人敷教啓門墻
香海濱 爐烽旁
一堂濟濟絃歌洋洋
敬業樂群學有方
自強不息德彌光
謝我天主錫我周行
謝我天主錫我周行

records.英文校訓: TO SERVE NOT TO BE SERVED
records.中文校歌歌詞: 年青人：沾沐主恩，肩負人類社會責任。 努力、勤奮、珍惜時刻分秒寸陰。 謹言、慎行，建立積極自信雄心。 真誠、自愛，謹記師長父母深恩。 謹記師長父母深恩。 年青人：聖靈啟迪，陶冶性情，豐盛人生。 協力同心，發揮立己立人精神。 遵主明訓：「非以役人，乃役於人。」 愛主愛人，為鹽發光，榮耀真神。

records.英文校歌歌詞:
1. 登高見博 the noble scholar's rule
Shines in the crest and spirit of our school.
2. High'rever high'r, we year by precious year
Climb learning's peaks for vision wide and clear.
3. On wisdom's wings aloft and soaring free
Find understanding, truth and harmony.
4. Exalt our school, enriched by history
her treasure's learning and humanity.
Climb High See Wide, the hope the will the pride of girls of Belilios through the generations.

With love, you build the school and fill our heart to overflow.
With hope, you lay the path and help us all to follow you.
Proclaim the truth.
Nurture our youth.
Lord, start your work.
Lord, bless your work.
Proclaim the truth.
Nurture our youth.
Lord, start your work.
Lord, bless your work.
On you, we rest our school, O Lord.
On you, we rest our school, O Lord.
With faith, we can reach you and be with you as you promise to.
With faith, we walk in you and witness you in all we do.
Proclaim the truth.
Nurture our youth.
Lord, start your work.
Lord, bless your work.
Proclaim the truth.
Nurture our youth.
Lord, start your work.
Lord, bless your work. Praise to the Lord. Praise to the Lord. Praise to the Lord. Praise to the Lord.
Amen！

records.校訓說明: [敦] ：有「厚」(五經文字) 與「勉」(廣韻) 之義‧左傳：「說禮樂而敦詩書」，「盡力莫如敦篤」，中庸：「溫故以知新，敦厚以祟禮」 故「敦品」即努力培養美好品德‧ [勵] ：有「勉力」(說文) 勸勉 (廣韻)，「修飾振起」(韻會)，勉勵 (後漢書祭彤註) 等義‧ 故「勵學」即志恆毅奮，潛心向學‧

records.校訓說明: 拉丁文「UT PALMA FLOREBIT 」，UT是好像，PALMA是棕櫚樹，而FLOREBIT是枝葉繁茂，欣欣向榮的意思。原句出自聖詠92篇13節，全文是：「正義的人像棕櫚繁盛，似黎巴嫩香柏高聳。」棕櫚樹是一種產於中東乾旱沙漠的常綠喬木，高達廿餘公尺，有掌形大葉，果子如棗，可供食用，味甘甜。棕櫚樹既能結出有用的果子，又能為沙漠上的旅客在烈日下提供清涼蔭處。在教會的禮儀及藝術上說，棕櫚樹又是致命者（即願意犧牲的人）的象徵。

Long Live O Alma Mater On thee may blessings rain, And may thy sons hereafter And may thy sons hereafter, Bring honour to thy name.

records.中文校歌歌詞:
東湧天主教我校
導我修身添愛心
胸襟廣闊 自我挑戰
快樂 堅定 謙遜
盡力好學 立己愛人
同窗新生同創
共建根基 一起向上
立志作家國棟樑

records.校名: 恩平工商會李琳明中學
records.辦學團體: 恩平工商會學務有限公司
records.中文校歌歌詞: 太平山下，玄歌淩雲，敦品勵學，唯我校訓。精誠團結，砥礪德行，尊師重道，孝親愛人，發憤圖強，卓爾不群
records.英文校歌歌詞:
We are cherished and nurtured with care. Hardworking, Courteous, Promising, Genuine,
We possess all perfect qualities and become tomorrow's leaders.
records.id: 恩平工商會李琳明中學

records.校訓說明:
"Lumen Accende"- To Ignite the Light of Knowledge
"Corda Inflamma" - To Kindle the Fire of Virtue
records.英文校歌歌詞:
At the dawn of my green years, when all day golden dreams fill me.
What a joy is for me to hear, that this school is welcoming me.
It will nurture my mind and my heart, and fulfil my longing for knowledge.
A light will glow in my mind. A fire will inflame my heart.
My uniform motto and emblem, show the way that I have to run.
It's a long very difficult one, but I haven't to travel it alone.
Plenty of young friends enthusiastic, join with me in this path of life.
A light will glow in my mind. A fire will inflame my heart.
Many teachers stand on my side, to spur me with my parents join my guides.
So each day new learning enriches my mind, making life more useful and bright.
My school hopes that I can discover that Jesus is my real friend.
He will make me live in love and light. He will give me His eternal life.
For me too the ripe age will come, with heavier burden on my shoulders.
But one thing makes me feel at home, to remember my school and my friends.
This will give me strength and light to find my way thro' the dark of night.
Jesus, make me live in love and light, and give me your eternal life.

records.校訓說明:
「文」：泛指所有之知識
「行」：指道德品行
「忠」：盡一己之心力
「信」：要真實,不自欺欺人
records.中文校歌歌詞:
齊唱誦我粉官的美  快樂活潑滿溫馨
庠友師生獻努力  成就耀眼叫千千聽
培養睿智遠矚高見  竭力尋求美與善
強化身體壯又健  和睦友愛敬師表孝
同愛覓探知識真理  致力行仁知守規
誠信忠心已建立  服務社會我心嚮往
* 來綻放你我歌  聲聲朵朵似花
粉嶺官中校譽日隆
records.英文校歌歌詞:
In voices united and strong We sing our school song
With virtue our moral guide We by goodness will abide
In voices loud and clear We sing to our school dear
With wisdom to light our way We will progress day by day
In voices cheerful and bright We sing by day and by night
With vigour strong are we In mind and body you can see
* Together we sing Together we sing in
Fanling Government Secondary School

records.中文校歌歌詞: 救恩青年人人振奮，基督使命不敢怠慢，憑功夫顯出真信心。何需怕巨浪高山。以愛基擊連荊途共赴，勞苦代價看作等閒，主再來日近增盼望，存忍耐衷心守關。看教會，顧國家，愛家庭本份責無旁貸。賴主恩實踐信愛望，凱歌奏榮神益人

records.辦學團體: 中華基督教禮賢會香港區會
records.英文校訓: Strive for excellence and bear witness to the Lord.
records.中文校歌歌詞:
禮賢中學基督精神，宣揚真理培育全人；
學子莘莘共坐一堂，砥礪互愛研讀勤奮。
良師益友春風化雨，明燈照耀身教先行；
學以致用委身社群，堅守主道生命永恆。

破浪乘風，壯懷似朝陽，天際吐艷，光采照耀。
竭盡我本分，作濁世清流:莫言倦，馳騁學海，莊敬並自強。
陶造，勵我心志，琢玉功宏；
祝「風采」鍾靈毓秀，英才譽滿江。
破浪乘風，臻善美指日登青雲，「風采」無疆﹗

records.School Name: CCC Fung Leung Kit Memorial Secondary School
records.辦學團體: 中華基督教會香港區會
records.中文校訓: 明道律己 好學立人
records.中文校歌歌詞: 馮梁結校，桃李長春，發揚基督博愛精神，明道律己，好學立人，工商教育，實事求真。玄歌昭日，鐘響青雲，培育英才，普彰主恩。春風化雨，日新又新。莘莘學子，奮志克勤；器成琢玉，允武允文，造福社會，萬事樂群，萬事揚芬

records.校名: 香港中國婦女會馮堯敬紀念中學
records.School Name: HKCWC Fung Yiu King Memorial Secondary School
records.中文校歌歌詞: 少時也許只知道。考試成績優與良。偶然停步看成人，才知考驗時日長。書本給我什麼？教我每事原理，遇事自然能衡量。師長仿似明燈，教我注重人格，訓導和指向。我懷抱中衡霄志，投入我香港。母校培我兼腹育，學生他日成棟樑。緊抱原則，抓緊理想，緊抱原則，壯志激昂
records.id: 香港中國婦女會馮堯敬紀念中學

records.中文校歌歌詞: 燦爛的朝陽照遍了雙魚洞，一片書聲是鳳溪的兒女玄誦，大好光陰，似錦前程。須知珍重，須知珍重。我們要勤勞儉樸，敬業合眾，要互相合作，甘苦與共，要急公好義，惟善是從，要品學兼優，體魄健全，為國家棟樑。這才是鳳溪的好兒童

records.英文校訓: In pursuit of truthfulness and perfection
records.中文校歌歌詞: 鐵煉方可變成鋼，玉琢才能發光芒。學海無涯情況勤是岸，求真擇善我方向，多元智能來培養，勇於創新敢擔當，博學慎思並重。中外文化匯通，終身學習以致用。師生、校友、家長團隊精神共發揚。雨露陽光百花放，福建中學好土壤，中華兒女當自強，愛我祖國愛香港，人人鬥志昂揚，發揮拼搏力量，齊為社會作棟樑
records.英文校歌歌詞: Efforts make us strong and wise, learning makes us shining bright, seek perfection all our life, be truthful with all our might. Our thoughts are broad and deep. We gain when cultures meet. We are happy students. Focused on our studies, reaching for the stars above, we promise due respect to everyone we've met. Sharing, caring, light our way, trusting, loving, make our way, build a future we belong, love our country, love Hong Kong, strive for high achievement, honor our commitments.Fukien school is home we love

records.英文校訓: Strive for virtue; Quest for truth
records.英文校歌歌詞: When there's learning to be done, making friendships, having fun, don't be worried by the problems on the way. Trying hard is what to do. Thinking forward, being true, learning lessons from each challenge of the day. We will look back on these days, having earned all the rewards that hard workpays. We will look back on these days, feeling strong in the wisdom of our ways

records.中文校訓: 光與生命；人人為我，我為人人
records.英文校訓: Light and Life; One for All, All for One
records.中文校歌歌詞: 學海征帆，晨曦遠照，九萬裡前程。光與生命，基督真理，吾輩貴篤行。五嶺之洋，春風化育，梁棟百年成。燈傳校訓，人人為我，我要為人人

records.School Name: Hong Kong and Kowloon Chiu Chow Public Association Secondary School
records.中文校歌歌詞: 我愛我校，宅此廣居，學聚問辮。有圖有書。修藏遊息，如耕與鋤。蓄德無窮，揚我校譽。邁往奮進，邁往奮進，逼韓江而及坤與。

懷著熱誠 帶著衝勁 開拓我校明亮前景
誠實待人 處事守信 謙虛禮讓 上進勤奮
愛心加熱誠 彼此關懷 親切互助又互愛

records.英文校歌歌詞:
Like the morning sun, up in Kowloon Peak, KTGSS has arisen.
Seat of warmth and perfect harmony, where we learn and play and grow.
Hard work, honesty, faith and modesty, guide us towards excellence.
Forward we march, heads held high, working towards a better world for all.
Forward we march, heads held high, working towards a better world for all.

With hearts and minds united,
We raise our voices strong.
To sing our school's high praises,
In chorus loud and long.
May Maryknoll's true spirit,
Our guide and strength 'ere be.
As now we join together,
All brothers, brave and free.
God's blessing be our armour;
His truth our weapon bright;
God's love shall be our banner,
Through life's long, arduous fight.
Our College calls us onward,
United, meet the foe;
As Maryknollers always,
Forward, to vict 'ry go!

Shing Mun Valley, wide and open,
Through here, streams of wisdom flow.
Firm as hills be our foundations,
Ever green as trees, we grow.
True and gracious, bravely prudent,
Noble spirit we shall hold.
Onward to the Highest Excellence,
Masters of tomorrow.

Oh, HO TUNG alma mater with the motto of justice and truth.Through you we learn through you we strive to walk in the path of light, culture, learning, skill acquired. We will be launched upon our course of patience and of freedom to guide our sense of truth and right

records.中文校訓: 非以役人 乃役於人
records.英文校訓: I Am Not Born for Myself Alone
records.校訓說明: Non nascor mihi solum（拉丁文）
records.英文校歌歌詞:
And did those feet in ancient time
Walk upon Hong Kong's mountains green
And was the holy Lamb of God
In Hong Kong's crowded cities seen?
And did the Countenance Divine
Shine forth upon our clouded hills?
And was Jerusalem builded here
Among these dark Satanic Mills?
Bring me my Bow of burning gold:
Bring me my Arrows of desire:
Bring me my Spear: O clouds unfold!
Bring me my Chariot of fire:
I will not cease from Mental Fight,
Nor shall my Sword sleep in my hand,
Till we have built Jerusalem,
On Hong Kong's hills and city Land.

records.中文校歌歌詞: 同學齊世界文明日日新。專心研讀創奇能，人無兩度再青年。莫把韶光付東川，莫把韶光赴東川。凡我輩，修齊治平志宜堅，利同群，竭力追隨古聖賢，福社會，道德宏章振鐘聲。同學齊歷史進程事益新。親仁團契見奇能，文明永垂億萬年。應將生命許山川，應將生命許山川。凡我輩守道力行似鐵堅，振雄心，服務熱忱比先賢，耀母校，薄海齊揚歌頌聲

records.英文校歌歌詞:
Our Captain and our King,
We kneel in love before Thee.
Our hearts in tribute bring
Glad homage here to pay.
O do not Thou disdain
The gift so mean, so poor;
More precious far we fain
Would offer and more pure.
Grant us, we pray, Thy cause
To champion, though so lowly,
Nor ever fail nor pause,
When trials throng and press.
O God of battle, smite,
And nerve us for the fray;
O Prince of Peace, Thy light
Can ev’ry toil repay.
Chorus
Our deep love, O Lord,
Till this our life is o’er.
Be Thine forever more,
Be Thine forever more,
Yes, Thine forever more.

Kindly instructor and guide of our youth.
Lighting the land with the bright beams of knowledge.
Teaching thy children to reverence truth.
Bound in close brotherhood all thy collegians.
Cherishing memories tender and strong.

Q.C.! Q.C.! Q.C.! Q.C.! Q.C.!
In that cry what a magic is found.
Let us roll out the glorious sound.
Q.C.! Q.C.!

records.英文校訓: Understanding Truth; Pursuing God; Developing Diligence; Cultivating Virtue
records.中文校歌歌詞:
滙萃勇敢精兵，基於上帝真理。
棠蔭道上建基業，興學育才耀真光。
全人教育努力創，天國承諾作力量。
聖靈寶劍加堅強，上下同心齊步往。
明道尚主，基督真理救靈魂；
勤學立德，作個社會好公民。
薪火相傳，共同發揚共耕耘。
年月月謹記我母校精神。
records.英文校歌歌詞:
Gather together soldiers of the truth of God;
Build up our foundation, and let the true light shine.
Give a Christian education, gain our strength from God’s promises.
Steadfast in the Spirit, we are all of one accord.
If we put Christ first, His truth will save our souls.
Build up our community through all that we do.
Pass the torch on, work together, spread the Word.
Always will I bear the Spirit of my alma mater.

records.中文校訓: 明道尚主 勤學立德
records.英文校訓: Understanding Truth; Pursuing God; Developing Diligence; Cultivating Virtue
records.中文校歌歌詞:
才幹知識永屬主，獨有救主永受尊崇。
神創立我校為顯主榮耀，為主基督作光。
靠主定意熱心努力，上進不懼攔阻，
竭忠盡志，同心與同步，同遵守主吩咐。
records.英文校歌歌詞:
Knowledge belongs to the Lord, worship and praise to Him forever.
God founded our School, his glory to show, bring true light to the world.
In Him we trust, dedicating our best, march on through rain or storm.
Faithful to the end, united we stand, his teachings we live by.

records.校訓說明: Faith, Hope, Love
records.英文校歌歌詞:
Now thank we all our God,
With heart and hands and voices,
Who wond’rous things hath done,
In whom Tsung Tsin rejoices;
Who from our founding year
Hath blessed us on our way
With countless gifts of love,
And still is ours today.
O may this bounteous God,
Through all the years be near us,
With charity and hope
And lasting faith sustain us;
O help Tsung Tsin to grow
And challenges to face;
Vouchsafe to keep Tsung Tsin
Forever in Thy grace.

records.校名: 基督教女青年會丘佐榮中學

records.中文校歌歌詞:
現在感謝我們所有的上帝，
用心、用手和聲音，
祂行過奇妙的事，
宗進在祂身上歡欣;
祂自建國之年
起便賜予我們
無數愛的禮物，
至今仍屬於我們。
願這位豐饒的上帝，
在歲月中陪伴我們，
以慈愛與盼
望與持久的信心支撐我們;
幫助宗進成長
，迎接挑戰;
保證宗宗
永永遠在祢的恩典中。
records.英文校歌歌詞:
Where southern skies are warming
And friendships firmly forming
We grow in strength and knowledge and join in grateful song
These ties will never sever; We'll loyal be forever
We've found a truth to live by, and courage to be strong
We all in eager yearning, are nourished here with learning
Until a common purpose has set our hearts afire
We'll serve the truth in living with generous self-giving
To make Hong Kong grow nearer to what our hearts desire
Along the paths of service no danger will unnerve us
For Christ moves on before us, Triumphant over wrong

records.英文校訓: Live by the Truth in Love
records.英文校歌歌詞:
Do you hear our joyful voices
Ringing sweetly through the skies?
Day by day our heart rejoices
As our thanks to heaven rise,
For our school instructs and leads us
On the way to virtue and love.
Live St. Francis'! Live forever
In our mind and in our heart!
Bless our teachers and companions
Be the bond when we depart!
Here we pray, we work together,
For the love of god and men;
Here we study, here we gather,
Here we play and here we gain
And when troubles seem to double
To our school for peace we turn.
Live St. Francis'!...x2

March, March, dear school friends,
Shoulder to shoulder,
Our heads lifted high,
Let us march to bear witness to Christ;
And vow ne'er to pause
Till we bring all to love and serve His cause.
Work, work, dear classmates,
Play well together
And work and at play,
Holy Family shines all the way;
Our school gives guidance kind,
To build a perfect character and mind.
Love, love, dear sisters,
In my heart you're near
To love and to care,
In the Christian spirit we all share;
Beloved school of mine,
On you may all the love of Jesus shine.
Refrain
We learn to live in unity
In our Holy Family
"Faith, Love, Duty" -  these we will bring
As our gifts to God our King -
We pray and sing with one accord
To thank and praise the living God.
Loyal and faithful loving true;
Holy Family, we are proud of you.

Under a banner thoughts uplifting,
Speaking high of virtue and love,
Our days are gently drifting
Wrapped in light from high above.
Refrain :
Of our Lady the name bearing
We come always to the fore
Evil spurning, all good caring;
Live St. Mary’s ever more!
In our mind a healthy knowledge,
In our heart a loved Name,
On our lips a smiling solace,
That all gloomy spirits tames.
Refrain :
The Canossa’s loving care
In our hearts may ever be
For the needy; may we dare
For them always raise a plea.
Refrain :
Girls united from all nations
Join we hands in common trust,
Strong of heart and pure in actions,
Thus we’ll meet life’s sorrows thrust.
Refrain :

01
In voices strong we sing together
United in the Sacred Heart
Enduring union that asunder
No pow'r of earth should ever part.
(Refrain)
Come let us form our spirit gay and strong.
For life is great, a gift of beauty rare,
A wondrous way of winsome grace for us
To make us joyous, virtuous, nobly fair.
02
With books and comrades true we pass
Our happy days of sinless joy;
We'll ever keep in the morass.
Of life their mem'ry unalloyed. (Refrain)
03
Our dearest School gives guidance due
To virtue real and wisdom kind.
That both together go to hew
A perfect character and mind. (Refrain)
04
In friendship true, in mutual love
Our common end let us attain:
Of Sacred Heart School worthy prove
In all the trials, in every strain. (Refrain)

records.中文校歌歌詞: 九龍獅子氣象雄，連山蒼翠列屏風。巍巍吾校崇三育，界限街頭時雨豐。一九五零構噐黌宮，莘莘學子，穆穆雍雍。隆師重道兮朝夕用功，止於至善兮天下為公，勉修己*安人兮，犧牲服務而盡忠。

Diligent and hard working, Simple fruitful living.
Courageous, helpful, sincere, dutiful.

records.辦學團體: 文理書院基金會有限公司
records.中文校訓: 博學、審問、慎思、明辨、篤行
records.英文校訓: Study extensively, Inquire accurately, Deliberate carefully, Discern clearly, Practise earnestly
records.中文校歌歌詞:
勤奮淳實校風，德智體群並重。
文、理、美、工，中外匯通，倡思考與實踐學風；
為求真知不畏難，那怕越嶺千萬重。
文理同學立理想，胸中壯志豪情萬丈。
齊散發出多少熱與光，不分工學與商；
成為時代齒輪，永遠向前邁進。
records.英文校歌歌詞:
Hold our heads up, our crest high.
Always forward let us stride!
Cognitio is forever an urge,
To Seek for knowledge and truth;
We are guided on our road,
To march against their strong hold.
Hold our heads up, our crest high.
And march on far and wide!
Cognitio is ever a school of fame,
We are proud to bear thy name.
Down the years and up the road,
Thro’ the wide eternal world.

records.辦學團體: 中華基督教會香港區會
records.英文校訓: Thou Art The Light Of The World
records.中文校歌歌詞:
中華我國，中華我國，獨立文明亞之東。
政成共和，民歌大同，學遍唐虞三代隆。
中華我國，中華我國，十萬兆民表雄風。
衛我邦家，同胞情重，普遍教育樂融融。
愛我真光，愛我真光，謝師長善誘維良。
發聾振瞶，啟迪多方，恍登臨洙泗之堂。
愛我真光，愛我真光，天道由茲愈發皇。
十字旗飄，萬古輝揚，能拯教失路亡羊。
勉哉同學，勉哉同學，暮暮朝朝同切磋。
光陰易逝，日月如梭，催人歲月易蹉跎。
勉哉同學，勉哉同學，廿紀風潮急且多。
木蘭紅玉，巾幗英雄，匡時偉業在我曹。
records.英文校歌歌詞:
We sing of a school where we’re happy as can be.
Of course, we mean Chan Kwong.
In our work and in our play, we’re as good as we can be,
for the glory of Chan Kwong.
For the glory of Chan Kwong we’ll live,
for the glory of Chan Kwong.
In the days that are to be, we’ll be good as we can be,
for the glory of Chan Kwong.
In the days that have gone by, there were keepers of the light.
Good keepers at Chan Kwong.
And in the coming time, we too will keep the light;
keeps it shining for Chan Kwong.
For the glory of Chan Kwong we’ll live,
for the glory of Chan Kwong.
In the days that are to be,
we’ll be good as we can be, for the glory of Chan Kwong."

records.校訓說明: 拉丁文：Fides, Spes and Caritas
records.中文校歌歌詞: 救恩青年人人振奮，基督使命不敢怠慢，憑功夫顯出真信心。何需怕巨浪高山。以愛基擊連荊途共赴，勞苦代價看作等閒，主再來日近增盼望，存忍耐衷心守關。看教會，顧國家，愛家庭本份責無旁貸。賴主恩實踐信愛望，凱歌奏榮神益人。

records.School Name: Salvation Army William Booth Secondary School
records.中文校訓: 敬畏耶和華，是智慧的開端，認識至聖者，便是聰明。
records.英文校訓: The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom, and knowledge of the Holy One is understanding
records.中文校歌歌詞:
1. 高舉血與火大軍旗，飄揚東方世界。
展開紅黃與藍三色，神愛永不失敗。
雖魔鬼在咆哮恐嚇神愛純善不變。
在這世代靠神靈力戰勝罪惡世界。
2. 當婦孺飢餓和哭泣，靈魂黑暗敗壞。
神賜給我們大應許，戰勝世界不懈。
幫助我們遊戲學習，熱誠有益活動。
傳揚神的亮光真理，新生命得自由。
records.英文校歌歌詞:
1. Unfurled the flag of three-fold hue. Against the Eastern sky.
Displays in yellow, red and blue. God's love can never die.
His purity, unsullied stands. Though demons howl and rage. And by His Spirit's pow's disbands. The evils of this age.
2. God grants this firm resolve to keep. We'll not stand heedless by,
While children starve, and women weep, And souls in darkness die. Help us in studies and in play. Pledge each activity. To spread the light of God's new day. His life and liberty.

records.英文校歌歌詞: The three religions of Confucianism, Buddhism and Taoism share the same origin. Wisdom, benevolence, courage, virtue, warmth, spring breeze and rain, the teachings' influence is vast and eternal. Respecting benevolence, valuing propriety, understanding morality, and supporting the teachings together, respecting the supreme way, the profound and mysterious, all the wonderful doors, universal relief, exhorting goodness, being bathed in great grace, advancing with great virtue, and cultivating great achievements, never forget the teachings. Golden words lay a solid foundation, and with diligence and perseverance, one can achieve great success

records.School Name: Ju Ching Chu Secondary School (Kwai Chung)
records.中文校歌歌詞:
我校創立，猗歟盛哉，以資紀念，以育英才。
自強不息，精神永在，良師善誘，五育兼賅。
辛辛學子，蔚然成材，發揚文化，繼往開來。
我校創立，猗歟盛哉，發揚文化，繼往開來。

我敬愛的學校，創立自同鄉，東南文物蘇浙之光。
整齊嚴肅校訓煌煌，有師長的訓導，有父老的讚賞。
努力努力齊向學，好復興民族，敬恭梓桑。
我敬愛的學校，創立自同鄉。

records.中文校訓: 信以致知(認識主是一切知識的開端)
records.校訓說明: 拉丁文：Crede ut intellegas
records.英文校歌歌詞:
1. In new Kowloon there stands Ts’un to, a school beloved by all; her name and fame we love to sing, her praises to recall.
2. With work and play and worship here, we fill each useful day, and seek to follow Him who is the Life, the Truth, the Way.
3. With Christian training forth we go, but memory's golden chain shall bind us still, with links of love, and promp't the old refrain:
(Refrain)
Ts'un To, Ts’un to, to her we bring, with hearts and voices blending, the love and praise of youthful days, a song that knows no ending.

records.英文校歌歌詞:
Boys of courage, boys of daring,
Full of manliness and will;
Spirits nought for danger caring,
Hearts to conquer every ill.
Chorus:
We are sons of La Salle everyone,
And no matter where we go,
High aloft her flag we will hold,
And strive that her fame may grow.
There are famous schools in plenty,
With their heroes by the score,
And they flourish high and mighty,
But La Salle is something more.
From her lofty station pointing,
To the sky’s majestic dome,
She would have us ever minding,
That above is our true home.
Come whatever kind of weather,
Come the stormy days along,
When the Old Boys get together,
They will always sing this song.

Hark! Daughters of the great St. Paul
Come, listen to his call
" O children of this loved school,
The loving nurse of all
Rejoice in God, do work and pray
Be true from day to day."
​
Beloved school of mine
My pains and joys are thine
My childhood's early dreams
Are closely linked with thee
The hope that heaven brings
Thou dost unfold to me
Thou dost unfold to me
​
Sweet are the days of girlhood,
When friends we love and care,
Those golden links of childhood,
Whose sympathy we share
Do stay and while the hours away
With us in work and play.
And when we leave
Our dear old school
These memories we'll recall!
These memories we'll recall!

records.英文校歌歌詞:
Let us sing unanimously to our school
Kingly its Slogan Noble our Rule

Faith in God guides our endeavour
Faith, Hope, Love for all…….
We can serve and lead together!

To learn is not alone to know;

Of our school now and always,
Grateful for love, joy and success,
The fruits of God’s own goodness.
Dedicated to promote the good,
Faith in God guides our endeavour;
Faith, Hope, Love for all…….
We can serve and lead together!
We can serve and lead together!

O Marymount, my Marymount,
Thou Beacon of the truth,
O glorious the vision bright,
That guides the steps of youth!
To Thee we pledge our loyalty,
O School we love so well,
We live to love and follow Thee,
O Alma Mater True,
We live to love and follow Thee,

O Marymount blest is thy power,
and wonderful Thine aim,
High virtue, wisdom, precious flower,
Thy seal to all proclaim,

Our school sweet model fair,

O Alma Mater True,
We pledge our word to honour Thee,

O Maryknoll, O Maryknoll,
Thy name most honoured be!
‘Tis given for the Queen of heav’n
Who shall our model be;
Through whom our school shall lead us,
To follow Christ, her Son,
Who is the centre of our lives,
The guardian of our school days.
We give our lives, our love, our trust to thee,
O Queen of Maryknoll.
We will forever be true.
Sing praise to her, sing praise to her,
The school whose life we share.
Whose light shall be for us a flame,
To lead us on to right;
The mother of our future,
From whom we shall carry truth.
To home, to country, to the world;
We call this our first duty.
We shall not fail in this our trust,
For we have pledged ourselves to thee.
O School we love Maryknoll.

records.校名: 聖公會聖馬利亞堂莫慶堯中學
records.School Name: SKH St. Mary's Church Mok Hing Yiu College
records.中文校歌歌詞:
求父使我生命如光，在此世上輝煌；
小小火焰，照耀明亮，無論我到何方。
求父使我生命如花，使人快樂增加；
不嫌自己園亭狹小，願意努力開花。
求父使我生命如歌，安慰愁苦的人，
幫助別人能夠剛強，歌者能夠歡欣。
求父使我生命如杖，弱者能夠依憑，
凡我所有健康力量，善能服事友鄰。
求父使我生命如詩，溫柔讚美的詩；
也是一首信仰的詩，永見父工神奇。阿們。
records.英文校歌歌詞:
God make my life a little light, Within the world to glow;
A little flame that burneth bright, Wherever I may go.
God make my life a little flower, That giveth joy to all,
Content to bloom in native bower, Although the place be small.
God make my life a little song, That comforteth the sad
That helpeth others to be strong, And makes the singer glad.
God make my life a little staff, Whereon the weak may rest,
That so what health and strength I have, May serve my neighbors best.
God make my life a little hymn, Of tenderness and praise,
Of faith, that never waxeth dim, In all His wondrous ways. Amen.
records.id: 聖公會聖馬利亞堂莫慶堯中學

records.中文校歌歌詞:
獅子山上朝陽照耀，老虎岩下歌聲嘹繞。
真理向我們招手，光明向我們微笑，社會因教育而光明，幸福由科學而創造。
慕光！慕光！慕光的同學們敬愛先生。
慕光！慕光！慕光的先生們愛護同學。
專心學習耐心施教，朝氣蓬勃志氣豪，要把大同社會來締造。

records.School Name: South Tuen Mun Government Secondary School
records.英文校訓: Discipline, sincerity, modesty and consideration for others
Wisdom, Truth, Virtue and Love to All
Persist with Virtuousness and Develop Perseverance
records.英文校歌歌詞: My mind is made to seek the truth. My soul is made for virtues joy. We’ll seek till mind and soul are filled. We’ll grow till love and skill are one. Like a flower that needs the light. Stretching itself up to grow. May our school give truth so bright. that we’ll bloom and virtue show. Shield us from error and harm. virtue be our sword against all wrong. Shield of truth and strong defense. Let us have a lasting virtue strong.

records.中文校訓: 恆毅是達致目標 (信念) 的精神質量
records.校訓說明:
恆: 專心致志 (就質【態度】而言)
毅: 持久忍耐 (就量【時間】而言)
信念: 由修己以及於他人 【自信、律己、尊重、包容】
恆毅是達致目標 (信念) 的精神質量
records.中文校歌歌詞:
寧波公學　寧波公學，大放曙光於香江。
培植人才，促進文化，增光我中華。
齊努力，向前進，桃和李，遍天下。
寧波兒女，團結精誠，四海一家。

青山碧海綠草，美麗世界設計奇妙週到，
清風吹過這泥土，幼樹茁壯了人漸漸高。
讓我不懊惱讓我感自豪，讓我歌頌讓我起舞。
早起請你唱歌，每日看看這裏奇妙的我，
開心歡笑似蘋果，世上有你有我奇妙多。
讓我多發奮讓我幫助人，讓我堅強面對苦困。
（副歌）
高歌主的愛真神奇，創造你創造我真美，
祂必看顧永不分離，一生一世讓我記起。
人人求上進《循道衛理》，一起發現天國道理！
（人人求上進翱翔萬裡，今天創造奇蹟是你！）

培僑像一個春天的花園，
集合著一群優秀的兒女，
在暴風雨的時代，
我們像一群海燕。
啊！
培僑，
你是青年的燈塔，
你指引年青的一代
走上民主科學的大道。
啊！
培僑，
我們永遠年青，
我們永遠前進，
新中國的建設，
靠我們青年的力量！

集合著一群優秀的兒女，
在暴風雨的時代，

你指引年青的一代
走上民主科學的大道。
啊！
培僑，
我們永遠年青，
我們永遠前進，
新中國的建設，
靠我們青年的力量！

records.辦學團體: 中華基督教會香港區會
records.中文校歌歌詞:
1. 維我母校，花地培英，百齡慶誕此寧馨，信望與愛，校訓叮嚀，白綠兒拳拳服膺，西關臺山有我胞兄，同氣相求，同聲相應，精誠團結，眾志成城，為我母校爭光榮。
2. 培育英才，我校仔肩，樹木樹人計萬全，河汾共學，紹述先賢，白綠兒猛著祖鞭，且看桃李滿羅堂前，力挽狂瀾，勒石燕然，太平山下，氣象萬年，維我母校萬斯年。
3. 我愛培英一家傳統，校友關懷促成功，眾校團結，力量無窮，培育英才建國用，白綠旗下，良師益友，學習雄鷹，頑強英勇，信望與愛，校訓叮嚀，為國為民全為公。

records.辦學團體: 啟思教育基金有限公司
records.中文校訓: 在這裏，我們茁壯成長，服務社群，立足世界
records.英文校訓: Through this place, we thrive, we serve and find our place in the world.

records.辦學團體: 香港中華基督教青年會
records.英文校歌歌詞:
Our College, instill us with courage and truth.
As onward together we study and grow;
Give light from the torch of knowledge you bear,
that we may be guided by Thy precious glow.
Onward, upward, light our darkened way,
guide us, guide us least we go astray.
Altogether, parting never, side by side we stay.
Our College, teach liberty, courage and truth.
In helping our brothers lead us, be our guide.
Enrich us, inspire us to follow God's will;
That we may give service the Four Seas wide.

records.School Name: Ching Chung Hau Po Woon Secondary School
records.中文校歌歌詞:
純陽大道，救世南針，忠孝廉節義信仁,合之惠禮，九美修心，化度人群返天真，青松設校，培育童生，
教循九美作完人，先自篤行，宣化眾生，轉移世道現卿雲。

荃灣荃中昔為沮洳今名揚
勵志砥行精神遠大高廣
峨峨黌宮師生遊息春風暢
共歌自由仁誠正直是尚
竹梅樟松團結黽勉共翱翔
止於至善斷斷兮永自強
records.英文校歌歌詞:
Where once were swamps, Tsuen Wan has now arisen
Here is our school, and large our spirit grows
These walls do not our hearts or minds imprison
Because our school (as e'en the youngest knows)
Transcends its bounds with ev'ry youthful vision,
and we are free; Our guide, Integritas.
Pine, Plum, Bamboo and Camphor don't divide us,
We all are one; together on our way,
With Scout and Guide and Monitor beside us,
And Prefect too, our School we'll not betray.
In work and play, at school, at home, and always,
In all we do, we'll seek Integritas.

records.School Name: St. Francis Xavier's School Tsuen Wan
records.英文校歌歌詞:
1. St. Francis xavvier’s boys are we. our Moto is integrity and universal love our goal. To spread good will our never ending role.
2. We'll try our best in work and play. We shall not waste a single day. To strive ahead be our rule, immortalize St. Francis Xavier's school.
(Repeat):
But mottos are an empty dream, if not observed but only seen. So let our voices now proclaim, "Integrity outweighs mere fame."

records.校名: 仁愛堂陳黃淑芳紀念中學
records.School Name: Yan Oi Tong Chan Wong Suk Fong Memorial Secondary School
records.中文校歌歌詞: 望遠青山樹影鬱蒼蒼的覆蓋，傍以碧波萬裡新界西的滄海，校園在市內，滌俗塵若世外，清幽秀麗，美好風采。願勉陳黃淑芳校內，師生互敬重，春風化育，歡欣滿載。名禮義廉恥，言行慎信善惡分，知明天我會成才，決心恭行仁愛。
records.id: 仁愛堂陳黃淑芳紀念中學

records.School Name: Yan Oi Tong Tin Ka Ping Secondary School
records.校訓說明: 取自【論語、雍也】篇孔子訓言：「己欲立而立人」。校訓明確標示本校辦學的宗旨是培育同學在德、智、體、群、美五方面的均衡發展，樹立個人優良的品質；並在立己的同時，推己及人，進而愛護學校，關心社會，服務人群。
records.中文校歌歌詞: 屯門內望，山景懷抱。朝氣蓬勃處，育我們這一群。師生朝夕互助勉，切磋琢磨日日新。敦品力學，慎思審問。五育並重，明德修身。己立立人，仁愛愛人。齊來吧，齊來吧，珍惜韶華，努力耕耘。為社會，為人群。

2. 培育英才，我校仔肩，樹木樹人計萬全，河汾共學，紹述先賢，白綠兒猛著祖鞭，且看桃李滿羅堂前，力挽狂瀾，勒石燕然，太平山下，氣象萬年，維我母校萬斯年。
3. 我愛培英一家傳統，校友關懷促成功，眾校團結，力量無窮，培育英才建國用，白綠旗下，良師益友，學習雄鷹，頑強英勇，信望與愛，校訓叮嚀，為國為民全為公。
records.英文校歌歌詞:
1. The wise may bring their learning. The rich may bring their wealth.
And some may bring their greatness, And some bring strength and health;
We, too, would bring our treasures To offer to the King;
We have no wealth or greatness: What shall we students bring?
2. We'll bring Him hearts that love Him: We'll bring Him thankful praise,
And young souls meekly striving To walk in holy ways:
And these shall be the treasures We offer to the King.
And these are gifts that even The poorest one may bring.
3. We'll bring the little duties We have to do each day;
We'll try our best to please Him, At home, at school, at play:
And better are these treasures To offer to our King.
Than richest gifts without them; Yet these we all may bring. A-men.

records.辦學團體: 基督教國際四方福音會
records.中文校訓: 博 愛 明 誠
records.校訓說明:
博愛－把基督耶穌的愛記於心內、行於生活中】
「博」－廣也，大也，所以擁有更多。
【明誠－凡事以誠待之，在生活與求學之中方能達至美善境界】
「明」清晰也，辨別清楚。
「誠」真實無妄也。
「四書五經」記載－ 大學右傳之六章，釋誠意： 「所謂誠其意者，毋自欺也。如惡惡臭、如好好色，此之謂自謙。」「富潤屋、德潤身、心廣體
胖、故君子必誠其意。」
中庸右第廿章，釋誠之目的： 「誠者，天之道也。誠之者，人之道也。誠者不勉而中。不思而得。從容中道。聖人也。誠之者，擇善而固執之者
也。博愛之，審問之，慎思之，明辨之，篤行之。」
中庸右第廿一章，子思論誠： 「自誠明謂之性。自明誠謂之教。誠則明矣。明則誠矣」。
「愛」－耶穌基督的愛記載於約翰福音第13章：34－35節「我賜給你們一條新命令、乃是叫你們彼此相愛。我怎樣愛你們，你們也要怎樣相愛。你
們若有彼此相愛的心，眾人因此就認出你們是我的門徒了。」
耶穌的愛是無種族、國界、階級之分，它是作良好公民之要素，為進入世界大同道路。所以我國國父孫中山先生倡議「博愛」為進入大同之途徑。
耶穌基督論「愛」的內涵： 哥林多前書第13章：4－8節「愛是恆久忍耐、又有恩慈。愛是不嫉妒，愛是不自誇，不張狂，不作害羞的事，不求自
己的益處，不輕易及怒，不計算人的惡，不喜歡不義，只喜歡真理。凡事包容，凡事相信，凡事盼望，凡事忍耐。愛是永不止息。」

We build our school on thee, o lord; to thee we bring our common need; the loving heart, the helpful word. The tender thought, the kindly deed. With these we pray thy spirit may. Enrich and bless our school always. We work together in thy sight, we live together in thy love; guide thou our faltering steps aright; and lift our thoughts to heaven above. Dear lord, we pray thy spirit may, be present in our school alway. Hold thou each hand, to keep it just; tough thou our lips, and make them pure; if thou art with us, lord, we must be faithful friends and comrades sure. Dear lord, we pray thy spirit may, be present in our school alway. We change, but thou art still the same; the same good master, teacher, friend. We change, but lord, we bear thy name, to journey with it to the end. And so we pray thy spirt may, be present in our school alway.

The boys of St. Francis Xavier's.

records.校名: 聖公會白約翰會督中學
records.校訓說明:
Our school motto is ‘DAT DEUS INCREMENTUM’ (Latin) in which ‘DAT’ means ‘gives’, ‘DEUS’ refers to ‘God’ and ‘INCREMENTUM’ translates as ‘growth’. As a whole, it means that ‘God makes us grow’, [1] which is known as the family motto of Bishop Baker. ‘Míng Daò Rì Xīn’, the Chinese paraphrase of the school motto that stems from both the Bible [2] and
the old Chinese classic Lĭjì, [3] conveys the belief that ‘understanding the Truth helps people grow spiritually day by day’.
This Latin motto is quoted from 1 Corinthians 3:6 of the New Testament that ‘ὁ θεὸς ηὔξανεν’ (Greek) or ‘God gave the growth’. (NRSV)
‘Míng Daò’ derives from 1 Timothy 2:4 of the New Testament that ‘God desires everyone to be saved and to come to the knowledge of the truth.’ (NRSV)
‘Rì Xīn’ originates from Lĭjì-Dàxué that ‘On the bathing tub of Tāng, the following words were engraved: “If you can one day renovate yourself, do so from day to day. Yea, let there be daily renovation.” ’

人群裡, 扶持上路去譜寫精彩。

努力此刻, 珍惜這生, 奉上心志,
快樂就是, 獻出星火照亮世間。
在十架裡, 齊學去愛人如己；
用真心, 朝著永恆盼望。
燃亮我心, 傾出每分熱情,
只因主愛 使我們的心溫暖。
迎接世間千百幻變, 我們的心不變。
蒙主保守我永心堅, 迎風敢闖過每一天,
憑主恩典面對新挑戰。
迎接世間千百幻變, 我們的心不變。
蒙主保守我永心堅, 迎風敢闖過每一天,
憑主恩典面對新挑戰。

北區風光，明媚怡人，融風吹四方，
同學感奮，勇於前行，心懷遠象；
萬眾一心，努力向上，莫負主深恩，
學海進取，任重道遠，知天添信心；
融風再起，送遍四方，志學力前行！
records.英文校歌歌詞:
1. Rejoice, ye pure in heart! Rejoice, give thanks, and sing! Your glorious banner wave on high, The cross of Christ your King.
*Rejoice, Rejoice, Rejoice, give thanks, and sing!
2. Bright youth and snow-crowned aged, Strong men and maidens meek, Raise high your free, exulting song, God's wondrous praises speak.
3. With all the angel choirs, With all the saints of earth, Pour out the strains of joy and bliss, True rapture, noblest mirth.
4. Yes on through life's long path, Still chanting as ye go, From youth to age, by night and day, In gladness and in woe.
5. Praise Him Who reigns on high, The Lord Whom we adore, The Father, Son and Holy Ghost, One God for ever more.

records.英文校歌歌詞:
We build our school on Thee, O Lord;
To Thee we bring our common need.
The loving heart, the helpful word,
The tender thought, the kindly deed.
We work together in Thy sight,
We live together in Thy love;
Guide Thou our faltering steps aright,
And lift our thoughts to Heaven above.
Hold Thou each hand to keep it just;
Touch Thou our lips and make them pure.
If Thou art with us, Lord, we must
Be faithful friends and comrades sure.
We change, but Thou art still the same,
The same good Master, Teacher, Friend;
We change but, Lord, we bear Thy Name
To journey with it to the end.
Dear Lord we pray Thy Spirit may
Be present in our school alway.

哈巴穀書3:19

records.英文校歌歌詞:

records.中文校歌歌詞: 混沌初開,是誰的足跡,已踏遍香江的翠綠山巒,是聖潔的,主的羔羊,現身香江這繁華的城市.是主的神聖面容及光芒,閃耀在雲霧繚繞的山崗,讓聖地耶路撒冷建立在這處，罪惡及黑暗彌漫的地方。賜我火焰的金弓，賜我盼望的聖劍，賜我神矛，刺穿烏雲，賜我烈火的戰車，我會永不休止，扞衛靈思，不讓我劍，伏匿於手，直至耶路撒冷，建立在這香江的山林和城市。

I will not cease from mental fight, nor shall my sword sleep in my hand, till we have built Jerusalem on Hong Kong hills and city land.

records.校名: 聖瑪加利男女英文中小學
records.School Name: St. Margaret's Co-Educational English Secondary and Primary School
records.英文校訓: Pursuit of virtues to perfection with self-renewal spirit
records.校訓說明:
校訓 - 《明德新民， 止於至善》
出處 ：
「大學之道，在明明德， 在新民， 在止於至善。」 《禮記 - 大學》
大學之道 ：
大學， 朱熹釋為 「大人之學」， 意即指有關政治或人生哲理等高深而廣博的學問。
明德 ：
儒家認為人生來便具有善良光明的德性， 此即為明德， 但卻受到後天物質利害的蒙蔽壓抑。 若加以適當的教育， 便能使明德顯露出來。
新民 ：
「新」 動詞， 革新之意。 即不斷敦品勵行， 自我革新求進， 然後推己及人， 將自己的德學貢獻給社會。
止於至善 ：
止的意思並不是終止， 而是 「必至於是而不遷」 之意；換言之， 「止」 兼有達成和維持之意義。 未達理想前， 必須勉力以赴； 達成之後則務使其維持不墜， 這才算是 「止」。 故祇有使事物皆能達到最美善圓滿的境界， 才能稱得上是 「止於至善」。
總而言之 ，校訓 《明德新民， 止於至善》 的用意就是啟發學生， 使他們都能發揚與生俱來的光明德性， 自新其德， 敦品勵行， 積學儲

Testifying to the grandeur

Hence our trust in your good favour!
When perchance hard times beset us,
We'll confide all to Our Lady,
Heart to heart with mind recalling
Clearly the ideals she sets us.

records.英文校訓: Being able to manifest one's highest morality
records.校訓說明:
「克明峻德」
最早見於《書經．堯典》：「克明俊德」
註：克：能也；俊：通峻，大也。
另《禮記．大學》：「帝典曰：『克明峻德』」
按：此乃引文，所謂帝典，實指《書經．堯典》。
《書經》乃春秋時孔子所手刪，《禮記》則成於漢人之手。而且〈大學〉篇既指明引《書經》文，所以當以出自《書經》為是。
所謂「克明峻德」，就是勸人「要能彰明本身的大德」的意思。儒家思想認為，人人心中本來都有良知善性（大德），這點良知，是人心所固有，與生俱來，有分辨是非善惡的能力，乃一切行為的準則，是非的尺度。但可惜這份良知，常常被後天的私慾蒙蔽。聖人教人要時時除去心中的私慾，彰明本來的良知大德，便是一個完美的人了。

records.校訓說明:
校徽內的學校名稱分別以中文書寫及英文簡寫；而校訓「謙遜和平」「HUMILITAS ET PAX」則分別以中文及拉丁文書寫，並位於校徽正中方及綵帶內。「謙遜」意指每個人應該承認自己對真理和知識的瞭解不足，然後方可虛懷若穀,樂於接受別人的教導，從而得益。正如聖經中若翰洗者對耶穌一樣。學生只有常懷謙遜的心才可令自己學問充實、人生完滿。
「和平」意指人生在追求學問中，更要學習與人共處之道，只有這樣，才能達到成己成人的終極目標。聖經中聖斯德望宗徒的殉道故事，啟發了我們要為世界和平、人與人融洽共處而在所不惜。本校希望學生培養愛主、愛人和愛己的精神，為社會作出貢獻。
records.英文校歌歌詞: To our school let us sing our anthem. Hearts at one and mind alert. Truth it teaches may we fathom, truth's sound comfort here on earth. Truth's our food if mind be healthy, Truth's our choice if true we be. To our school and to society to the holy trinity. Hence our traning, hence our learning, truth to reign in mind and will.

1. 共此天與地，歲月成長。別後他年到那岸，毋負共聚，耕耘堅守志向。

records.校訓說明:
拉丁文EXCELSIOR。本校校訓「明德至善」，摘自《四書》之《大學》。其原文說：「大學之道，在明明德，在親民，在止於至善。」「明德」，即人與生俱來靈明不昧的天性，分辨是非善惡的能力。其高潔雅淨有如一面不染點塵的明鏡。憑此天性，世間一切真是、真非、真惡，可昭然辨明。「至善」，乃事理當然之極致，即人生品格已臻完美無瑕的至高境界。而英譯校訓EXCELSIOR是拉丁文，有著「更佳、更高、更完善」的意思。
本校所以採「明德至善」此四字作為校訓，目的在希望同學好好認識人類與生俱來，屬於自我，最可寶貴的「明德」。然後，以此作為起點，認真學習，謹慎修養，求品格之日有進境。如此，雖則社會因物質進步而人的欲望日趨強烈，學校教導學生要有所守、有所持，提點學生不論在家庭、學校或社會中都要做到最好，並謹慎地知所取捨，遷善遠惡，以求在學識及修養方面皆有進益，成為貢獻社會的良好公民。
records.中文校歌歌詞: 約旦河流，西雍山岡，天心一顆，永吐光芒。巍峨培聖，賴顯輝煌，中西薈萃，國學恢張。春風時雨，桃李芬芳，同沾恩澤，靈化賢良。達己達人，愛德昭彰，至聖至善，矢志不渝。培聖培聖，作育多方，名教德音，木鐸鏗鏘。

records.校訓說明: 拉丁文：Perfectio Virtutis。拉丁文意思是德行的完美地步；「止於至善」。
records.中文校歌歌詞:
1. 今日正青年，尋覓世間美與善。遇到打擊仍然向前，勝利可看見。各樣道理天天演變，虛心多發現。擴大見識尋求體驗，細心更具遠見。歌頌這青年，讓我發揮美與善。願以基督友愛普照，把青春貢獻。
2. 生命發光芒，讓這世間有盼望。罪惡與黑暗要抵抗，一起聲更壯。熱誠熱切開心開朗，努力可見岸。發掘世間文明寶藏，要新意讓我創。感謝這多年，同學老師 要記念，願以基督友愛普照，把一生奉獻。

records.校訓說明: 拉丁文：IN CONSILIO SAPIENTIA
records.英文校歌歌詞:
We came by many ways from many homes,
But we were marching to the same one,
The home of our love second to none,
It has a name that our heart has won.
The joy we share of a dear family,
We get to know all children of one Father,
In love, in learning, in helping each other,
Ready to try whatever man can dare.
Happy to suffer whatever man can bear,
Wisdom for life in our school we gather,
By meditating and by taking counsel.
True children of the Mother of good Counsel,
To whom we turn our heart in prayer.
She is our Patroness and a sure guide,
Of our school she is the greatest pride,
May our dear school by her lead us all through life,
Where the joy never shall die.

records.校訓說明:
本校之中文名字「新民」乃直譯自英文原意 (new man) 即革新人民。記述孔子教誨之大學一書，對此有詳盡解說。尤有湊巧大學言至善，亦包含每人均依照其個人程度而發展至最高成就之概念。孔子教導之另一思想為德行,乃包含品格之修養及待人之正確態度。
因此本校之校訓「明德至善」實乃出於聖若望·亨利·紐曼樞機及孔子兩人之哲學思想。

records.校訓說明: The fear of the LORD is the start of wisdom, and the knowledge of the Holy One gives a wise mind.(Proverbs 9:10)
records.中文校歌歌詞:
同心踏進這家裡，齊肩擔基督使命，
同敞開心分享主的愛，彼此分擔憂與喜；
同將真理光照世上，願作精兵不後退，
縱使多崎嶇，荊棘滿途，同邁進忘記自我。
同將歡欣的幼苗，落遍這校園內，
以至誠、仁愛栽植，盼待明日盛放豐收。
興起奮進向理想追尋，未懼怕風浪往前征！
在知識汪洋，存謙卑覓尋，永肩擔公義與憐憫。
往天下萬國實踐主的愛，無負基督共培基名！
records.英文校歌歌詞:
We gather here as daughters and sons,
This mission of Christ we bear:
From many hearts we unite as one
And the love of God we share;
To live as children of the light,
Let us shine before all men;
Standing fast and firm, through praise and plight
For His grace will never end.
Our hearts be cultivated with peace, joy, faith and grace,
Bearing fruit of the Spirit, so let them ripen in this place.
Living out with justice and mercy
To walk in steadfast purity,
We humbly seek Him,
We wholly serve Him,
With passion and humility.
The stewards of the Lord now we shall be,
May Pooi Kei declare his glory.

records.校名: 香港聖公會何明華會督中學
records.英文校訓: Praise the virtues and perfect the disciplines
records.校訓說明:
「崇德尚藝」: 四字校訓總述出學校的辦學宗旨及教學上的兩個首要關懷的目標，表明了學校的教育目標是要培養出德藝雙修的青年。
「崇德」:學校以基督教信仰的精神，栽培學生認識上帝，並培養他們各種能達己達人的價值觀及態度
「尚藝」: 學校提供優質的教育，建立學生在知識及能力等方面的成長，裝備他們回饋社會，成為對社會有貢獻的人。
records.id: 香港聖公會何明華會督中學

合：成為時代齒輪，永遠向前邁進。

records.英文校歌歌詞:

Long live! O Al-Ma-Mater!

And may thy sons hereafter.

records.校訓說明:
「誠明」二字見於《中庸》。《中庸》說：「誠者，天之道也。誠之者，人之道也。」
又說：「自誠明，謂之性。自明誠，謂之教。誠則明矣，明則誠矣。」
「誠」是德性行為方面的；「明」是知識暸解方面的。「誠」是一項實事，一項真理；「明」是一番知識，一番暸解。以此兩字作為校訓，是訓勉我們，要把為學做人視為同等重要的事業。
records.中文校歌歌詞:
日日新又日新，
勤於學敏於事，
愼於言謹於行。
少年的光陰如流水之悠悠易逝，
少年的心情如佳木之欣欣向榮。
敬我師⻑樂我群，
愛我家庭仁我⺠。
天光不息農圃⻑春。
這(兒)是綠野神州，南海之濱。
我們是中華⺠族神明子孫，
我們的學業德業和事業日新又日新。
中華的文明在新的亞洲新的世界萬古常新。

records.中文校歌歌詞:
宣道同學起來！大家立定心志，
努力學業，充實自己，聖經訓言常記。
當趁現在求學時，就要建立好根基，
將來為主宣揚真理，謀人類福祉。
records.英文校歌歌詞: Alliance students,  arise! We stand with one true mind,to strive for know - ledge to the full, and Bi - ble truth re-mind. It's time to get well grounded, on truth we learn in our youth,pro - claim the Gos - pel and bring blessings to all man - kind.

records.校訓說明: 拉丁文：Crede Ut Intellegas
records.英文校歌歌詞:
1. In old Kowloon there stands Ts'un To, a School beloved by all
Her name and fame we love to sing, her praises to recall.
2. With work and play and worship here, we fill each useful day
and seek to follow Him who is the Life, the Truth, the Way.
3. With Christian training forth we go, but memory's golden chain
shall bind us still with links of love, and prompt the old refrain.
~Refrain~
Ts'un To, Ts'un To, to her we bring, with hearts and voices blending
the love and praise of youthful days, a song that knows no ending.

records.英文校訓: Prepare yourself that you may serve
records.校訓說明: 拉丁文：Vos Parate Ut Serviatis
records.英文校歌歌詞:
Bring to our song the thankful soul,
the loving thought, the shining dream.
And let us all as one extol.
Our general and our several theme.
Our School of royal title.
Bring great gladness to her honouring.
Elizabeth a queenly name,
begins the song and so begun.
Fair be our school’s advance and fame.
And ever new her glory won.
The glory of the wise and good.
And old truth newly understood.
May knowledge from our works increase,
and serve the world and spread the light,
Be ours to share an active peace,
among ourselves first learned a right.
And from this school let this be shown,
“T’was mine, but was not mine alone.”
Now close the song; and close in full.
Re-echo, ‘Queen Elizabeth School’.

We all love Is-lam, fight for peace for every-one.
Struggle we must, welfare we seek, onward we march.
We all love Is-lam, with Al-lah’s spirit we’re in-stilled.

中華基督教會香港區會
records.英文校訓: Time is precious, treasure every minute
records.中文校歌歌詞:
校歌：
一片朝煙罩 風景殊清秀 高聳半山中 英華學校
惟願普天下 皆蒙主拯救 務宜惜寸陰 在茲學校
英華 英華 既輝耀於山丘 爾諸生其作光而無休
英華 英華 既同學而力修 爲爾主使功業之永留
諸生群受教 得恩何豐厚 身遠心莫離 英華學校
惟願我英華 勿徒崇外貌 願爲爾作工 由茲學校
英華 英華 既輝耀於山丘 爾諸生其作光而無休
英華 英華 既同學而力修 爲爾主使功業之永留
校詩：
建我學校在基督身
因將素需向主懇祈
即此惠語即此愛忱
即此善行即此慈意
此即我禱  惟聖靈靠
時將利福  賜我學校
吾人同業在主目中
吾人同居在主愛裡
疑惑階級求主疏通
天上思想求主開啟
主前我禱  惟聖靈靠
時能顯現  於我學校

records.辦學團體: 中華基督教會香港區會
records.英文校歌歌詞:
School song:
Home of our youth,
To thee we bring the homage of lives at the spring.
Training thy sons for the game of life,
Sending them forth to the age-long strife,
Ready thy name, ever bright to uphold,
Ready 'gainst evil to fight and be bold.
May those who left thee in years that are past
Guard well thy honour; to truth holding fast.
Home of our youth to thee will we sing,
Long may thy name on our lips proudly ring.
School Hymn:
1.
We build our School on Thee, O Lord,
To Thee we bring our common need;
The loving heart, the helpful word,
The tender thought, the kindly deed:
With these we pray
Thy Spirit may
Enrich and bless our School always.
2.
We work together in Thy sight.
We live together in Thy love;
Guide Thou our faltering steps aright,
And lift our thought to heaven above:
Dear Lord we pray
Thy Spirit may
Be present in our School always.
3.
Hold Thou each hand to keep it just,
Touch Thou our lips and make them pure;
If Thou art with us, Lord we must,
Be faithful friends and comrades sure:
Dear Lord, we pray
Thy Spirit may
Be present in our School always.
4.
We change, but Thou art still the same,
The same good Master, Teacher, Friend;
We change, but, Lord, we bear Thy name,
To journey with it to the end:
And so we pray
Thy Spirit may
Be present in our School always.

Oh King's College lives forever
Nothing shall our friendship sever
Nothing shall defeat us ever
Glory to our school.
Listen to our sound of singing
Listen to our voices ringing
Joy and honour we are bringing
Glory to our school.
Soon we will be grown men
There will be new boys then
Summon all the new and old
They'll sing and shout together.
Old boys, new boys winning glory
We ourselves must write the story
Keep this challenge still before ye
Glory to our school.

records.中文校歌歌詞:
人活在彩色世界，誰共我找著方向？
自愛，自知，自發，自強！
自信，發光照亮！
昂首，踏進優才學校，
老師心血培養
矢志做棟樑，謙信厚道，前進，一生善良！

records.School Name: Yu Chun Keung Memorial College No.2
records.英文校訓: " But when he, the Spirit of truth, comes, he will guide you into all the truth."
records.校訓說明: 拉丁文：Spiritus Docebit Vos Omnia. "Spiritus Docebit Vos Omnia” is a saying excerpted from Gospel of John 16:13 “When the Spirit of truth comes, he will guide you into all the truth”. The badge demonstrates not only the College's being a Catholic school, but also our principles of management, representing our teaching staff's dedication to truth and loyalty - we encourage students to pursue knowledge, sacrifice themselves and serve the society.
records.中文校歌歌詞:
振強我心勵吾志，春風雨露霑滿園，
栽培我輩竭誠意，五育並重啟心志。
熱心追隨蒙主恩，善盡責任與愛心，
堅持理想不畏艱巨，弘揚聖道無後退。
真理力爭奮學求上進，願將我終身獻社會，
德進日新至善同勉，誓將我校名廣宣揚。

records.英文校訓: 拉丁文：UNICUIQUE SUUM - TO EACH HIS DUE
records.校訓說明: 拉丁文：UNICUIQUE SUUM - TO EACH HIS DUE
records.英文校歌歌詞:
Let us rejoice, Let us sing and praise together
The great Law which stands forever
As the rule of love and right
Let us proclaim, That to God and man alike
We should give what we are obliged
We must give each one his due
We must give each one his due
With our studies and our Wisdom
(We give God what is his due)
In our laws and in our work
(We give man what is his due)
By our care and by our love
(We give self what is his due)
To each one we give what's due
Let us be fair, while we pass through life's despair
Burdened under tasks and snares
With the hope of a better share
Let us prepare, For a life of love and care
Led by right and fully aware
Everyone must have his due
Everyone must have his due

records.校訓說明: 拉丁文：Viavirtutis Sapientia。
records.中文校歌歌詞:
山疊疊水重重，昆侖頂上產巨龍。
文化自古孕東魯，教育接踵到元中。
主理憑政府，公立表初衷。
雙語並重，一道同風。
勉予後學厥受中庸，
力行不厭致知無窮。
順潮流而奮發，爭為時代之先鋒。
records.英文校歌歌詞:
Mountains ford waters wind,
A top Kunlun the dragon was born;
Of old culture was nursed in Lu.
Now is teachings have come to our school.
The government at the helm.
It's public trait shows its goal.
Both idioms stressed.
The same way maintained.
May our students abide in truth Pers' vere always
Explore with out end. Ride the tide and strive hard.
Be the heralds of the times.

records.School Name: Ju Ching Chu Secondary School (Yuen Long)
records.校訓說明:
校訓「自強不息」，語出易經乾卦，原文「天行健，君子以自強不息」 ，意思是「自然運行，穩健無間之賢人志士，要發憤自勵，不停不棄」 。本校以此訓勉同學積極進取，在人生道路上不斷突破，追求卓越。基 於『有教無類』的教育理想，本校教育學生在德、智、體、群、美五育 全面發展，將來貢獻國家，服務社群。
強：「堅強」、「強力」、「毅力」、「堅毅」也；
自強：「自我堅持」、「自行乘持毅力」也；
息：「停息」、「休止」也；
不息：「不停」、「不棄」也。
records.中文校歌歌詞:
我校創立，猗歟盛哉，以資紀念，以育英才。
自強不息，精神永在，良師善誘，五育兼賅。
辛辛學子，蔚然成材，發揚文化，繼往開來。
我校創立，猗歟盛哉，發揚文化，繼往開來。

records.School Name: Yuen Long Merchants Association Secondary School
records.辦學團體: 元朗商會教育促進有限公司
records.中文校歌歌詞:
九龍半島，元朗闤中，紳商協力，立我黌宮。
莘莘學子，肅肅雍雍，賢能誕育，化俗成風。
奮可進取，勤能補庸，樸無華飾，誠竟其功。
皇皇四訓，夙夜是從，一心一德，互勵登峰。

records.校訓說明:
校訓 - 地鹽世光
出自聖經瑪竇福音5"13-16節，期望我們的學生都能發揮自己的才能，服務他人，以彰顯天主對人類的愛。
records.中文校歌歌詞: 效法基督，服務人間同勉敬主愛近人，願化光來照遍世上，願化鹽遵救主寶訓，質樸務學，實現理想，心志強愛助人致力行美善。加努力銘記雨的教導，讓愛傳家國添溫暖。鞭策自勵，共互勉創出新猷。靠著神我定能泊岸。加努力背棄惡寄主愛內。奉一生享見主，你侍我主元天滿盼望。立志行不枉此世。

records.校名: 基督教香港信義會元朗信義中學
records.School Name: ELCHK Yuen Long Lutheran Secondary School
records.中文校歌歌詞: 藍天碧水，沃野千里，元朗風光如錦繍。正心修身，校訓是遵，⻘年學子蒙神庇祐。桃李盈門，絃歌不休，奇葩芬芳，遍滿宇宙。靈知並進，體藝兼修，學業競進，週復週。同學們 同學們!讓我們挺胸昂首，為真理而奮鬥， 為家國創新猷。
records.id: 基督教香港信義會元朗信義中學
