records.英文校歌歌詞:
The treasure of knowledge we gain,
In laughter and tears we grow.
We’re here to fight for our future.
We have faith in our beliefs.
Be honest, be brave and strong.
Our future is in our hands.
The guidance from our teachers
Would lead us onto the path of sunshine.
So we’re here proud to sing,
We’re from CHEUNG CHUK SHAN COLLEGE.
Our roots are here, we’ll never forget.
We vow to do our best.
All we’re here proud to sing,
We’re from CHEUNG CHUK SHAN COLLEGE.
Eternally, our friendship would last.
We’re children of CHEUNG CHUK SHAN COLLEGE.
We vow to strive for the best!

records.School Name: Chiu Lut Sau Memorial Secondary School
records.校訓說明:
Wisdom: Acquiring wisdom from academic pursuit
明: 明辨是非，求知達理
Virtue: Loving others and serving the community
善: 善愛他人，惠澤社群
Honesty: Being an honest and upright person
誠: 誠實謙遜，正直忠純
Progress: Striving for improvement in every respect
身/新: 身體力行，奮進立新
records.中文校歌歌詞:
聿修中學，立訓明善誠身，
學以致用，融匯科技學術。
互助互愛，訓勉德智體群。
明白事理，誠懇待人，菁我同沐。
謙虛謹慎，我校同學，記取明善誠身。
我校同學，記取明善誠身。
records.英文校歌歌詞:
Lift our voices up!
Lut sau's motto we sing; wisdom, virtue,honesty and progress we bring.
Arts and sciences learnt and loved at our school.
Modest and true, kind and sincere.
Help each other.
Knowledge we share.
Lut sau's motto sound in our hearts as before.
Wisdom, virtue, honesty and progress once more!

records.校名: 香港華人基督教聯會真道書院
records.中文校歌歌詞:
立德，啟智，育靈，展體、美、群。
智慧、愛主心，與日俱增。
讓我銘感師訓；篤信、禮、義、勤。
良友勉勵，往前行。
求真行主道，達善臻美：
格物致知，善探微；
學貫中西益進，持謙遜；
無盡創意，勇敢探新知。
承先啟後，弘主志向：
竭力發光，成棟樑；
直向標竿衝線，迎挑戰；
領世界，擴視野，拓識見。
背十架，以愛將身獻。
records.英文校歌歌詞:
My lord gives me selfless love in my youth
Leads me to wisdom, eternal truth.
Our hearts weave the friendships of Logosians;
Be grateful, the joyful ones.
We tread the Road of Truth, for Honesty, Kindness, Beauty all our lives.
Open our windows wide for the world outside.
Innovations fill our curious minds.
We pledge to serve the world wholeheartedly,
shining like the Pillar Beams.
Embrace life challenges;
pursue our dreams;
Lead the world, beam love across the land.
Lead our lives for the glory of the Lord.

中華我國，中華我國，四萬兆民表雄風。

木蘭紅玉，巾幗英雄，匡時偉業在我曹。
records.英文校歌歌詞:
We sing of a school where we’re happy as can be,
of course, we mean Chan Kwong; In our work and in our play,
we’re as good as we can be, For the glory of Chan Kwong.
For the glory of Chan Kwong we’ll live, For the glory of Chan Kwong;
In the days that are to be, We’ll be good as we can be,
For the glory of Chan Kwong.
In the days that have gone by, there were keepers of the light,
Good keepers at Chan Kwong; And in the coming time,
we too will keep the light, keep it shining for Chan Kwong.

菁菁秀艾，馥鬱芬芳，
尊師樂業，有勇知方，

金山巍巍，香海泱泱；
偉哉安柱，彰主榮光。
同心同德，自勵自強，
信義忠誠，切記毋忘。

Boys and girls, like blooming flowers,
All respectful dauntless ever,
Truth and Scripture gladly uphold
High up Gold Hill, tow'ring the ocean,
Great our College, bring glory to the Lord.

德智體群美靈， 盡心同著重。
主有豐富恩典， 創始成終。

真理生命道路， 蒙福實無窮。

一生榮神益人， 有聖靈同工。
主有豐富憐憫，喜見萬裡虹。
records.英文校歌歌詞:

Bodies, minds and souls we give, striving to be true.

records.英文校歌歌詞:
1. Once to every man and nation, Comes the moment to decide,
In the strife of truth with falsehood, For the good or evil side;
Some great cause, some new decision, Offering each the bloom or blight,
And the choice goes by forever. Twixt that darkness and that light.
2. Then to side with truth is noble, When we share her wretched crust, Ere her cause bring fame and profit, And 'tis prosperous to be just;
Then it is the brave man chooses. While the coward stands aside,
Till the multitude make virtue Of the faith they had denied.

records.辦學團體: 中華基督教會香港區會
records.英文校訓: Learn to perceive the Word of God; Glorify Him and do good to others
records.英文校歌歌詞:
1. Almighty Father of all things that be,
Our life, our work, we consecrate to Thee,
Whose heav'ns declare Thy glory from above,
Whose earth bellow is witness to Thy love.
2. For well we know this weary, soiled earth
Is yet Thine own by right of its new birth,
Since that great Cross upreared on Calvary
Redeemed it from its fault and shame to Thee.
3. Thine still the changeful beauty of the hills
The purple valleys flecked with silver rills,
The ocean glist'ning 'neath the golden rays;
They all are Thine, and voiceless speak Thy praise.
4. Thou dost the strength to workman's arm impart;
From Thee the skilled musician's mystic art,
The grace of poet's pen or painter's hand
To teach the loveliness of sea and land.
5. Then grant us, Lord, in all things Thee to own,
To dwell within the shadow of Thy throne,
To speak and work, to think, and live, and move,
Reflecting Thine own nature, which is love
6. That so, by CHrist redeemed from sin and shame,
And hallowed by Thy Spirit's cleansing flame,
Ourselves, our work, and all our pow'rs may be
A sacrifice acceptable to Thee.

records.英文校訓: When you know the Truth, the Truth will set you free.
records.英文校歌歌詞:
1.        Heep Woh, our name, we gladly sing until the rafters ring.
With pride and grace we bear this name, with pride and grace we bear this name.
To add unto its fame, to add unto its fame.
2.        In old Canton Heep Woh began, by serving God and man.
And from its teaching of virtue, and from its teaching of virtue, came people trained and true,
came people trained and true.
3.        Our aim to learn and then to serve, with joyfulness and verve.
So, help us God through Thy great strength, so, help us God through Thy great strength,
To do this every hour, to do this every hour.
4.        United thus in name are we, and through our pledge to be.
United too in heart and mind, and long may live our heart and mind.
For service to mankind, for service to mankind.
5.        So long may live the name Heep Woh, forever and evermore.
And long may live our unity, united, too, in unity,
In love and service free, in love and service free.
